inventionTitles.title: The production method of pine nut tea vinegar drink
松子茶醋饮料的生产方法

address.address1: 545500 the Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region Liuzhou ancient town of Sanjiang Dong Autonomous County Agricultural Street No. 18
Liuzhou Jizhi Patent Trademark Office
Liuzhou Jizhi Patent Trademark Office

event-title.$: INVENTION PATENT APPLICATION WITHDRAWN AFTER PUBLICATION

section.content: 本发明公开了种松子茶醋饮料的生产方法，涉及饮料加工技术领域，它采用松子、茶叶、罗汉果和白糖制成，方法为把上述原料放入锅内加入山泉水煮沸，冷却后过滤得到浸提液，将浸提液接入醋酸菌种，搅拌均匀后封盖发酵，然后对发酵后的料液进行调酸，控制料液的总酸含量为0.3g/100ml～1g/100ml，可溶性固形物含量为3%～5%；将调酸好的料液灭菌后，进行真空无菌灌装即得。本发明的松子茶醋饮料为种集营养和保健作用于体的多功能饮料，用植物性的松子、茶叶、罗汉果的浸提液糖水作为醋酸菌培养基进行发酵，充分发挥这些植物的各方特性，具有各种香味物质和营养成分，是种酸味适度可口的饮料。

The invention discloses the production method of a kind of pine nut tea vinegar drink, relate to technical field of beverage processing, it uses pine nut, tealeaves, Momordica grosvenori and white sugar to make, method adds mountain spring water to boil for above-mentioned raw materials is put into pot, and cooled and filtered obtains leaching liquor, and leaching liquor is accessed acetic acid bacteria strain, the rear seal-cover that stirs ferments, then carrying out acid adjustment to the feed liquid after fermentation, the total acid content of control feed liquid is 0.3g/100ml～1g/100ml, and soluble solid content is 3%～5%；After good for acid adjustment feed liquid is sterilized, carry out sterile vacuum filling and get final product.The pine nut tea vinegar drink of the present invention is a kind of to collect the multifunctional beverage that nutrition and health care acts on one, ferment as acetic acid bacteria culture medium with vegetal pine nut, tealeaves, the leaching liquor syrup of Momordica grosvenori, give full play to each side's characteristic of these plants, there is various fragrance matter and nutritional labeling, be the beverage that a kind of tart flavour appropriateness is good to eat.

The production method of pine nut tea vinegar drinkTechnical field

The present invention relates to drink processing technique field, the production method of especially a kind of fruit tea vinegar beverage.

Background technology

Tealeaves contains catechin, Flavonoid substances, caffeine, polysaccharide, theophylline, theobromine, choline, xanthine, tea tan Matter, terpenes, phenols, alcohols, aldehydes, acids, esters, aromatic oil compound, carbohydrate, multivitamin, protein With the Multiple components such as amino acid, possibly together with the calcium beneficial to human body, phosphorus, iron, fluorine, iodine, manganese, molybdenum, zinc, selenium, copper, germanium, magnesium etc. 27 Kind of mineral matter, its nutrition is very abundant, and tea beverage is also because it has natural, nutrition and health care, an advantage quenched one's thirst, and becomes the world the One big beverage.With raising and the increase to health beverages demand of people's living standard, tea product just in diversified development, as Instant tea, liquid tea powder and fermented tea beverage etc..Fermented tea beverage is with tea as main matrix, is added thereto to some nutrition Material, such as sucrose, made the optimum physiological acoustic signals of the tea generation degree of depth by their metabolism, thus improve tealeaves product Matter.Fermentable tea beverage is a kind of special fermented tea beverage, belongs to emerging health-care tea beverage, and tea is through microorganism After fermentation, can increase many plurality of active ingredients such as microbial metabolic activity material and microbial cells itself, quality obtains Very big improvement.Fruit vinegar beverage is also a kind of novel healthy beverage, and fruit vinegar is to health care, and effect of beautifying face and moistering lotion is notable, it It is to make through alcoholic fermentation and acetic fermentation under the effect of microorganism.In the market fermentable tea beverage is rarely had Report, and research and develop fermentable tea beverage to solve that low and middle-grade tea are unsalable and the comprehensive utilization deep processing development of tealeaves all Having positive effect, if can combine tea beverage and vinegar beverage, the fragrance matter obtaining a kind of existing tealeaves becomes with nutrition Point, there is again the tea vinegar new varieties beverage of the nutritional labeling of acetic acid, then can increase tea beverage kind, meet the market demand and promote tea The development of product.

Pine nut is fatty, protein, carbohydrate etc.；Pine nut is important Chinese medicine, is also the food that U.S.A hides, eats for a long time The body-building heart, skin care, promote longevity, also have very high food therapy value.Pine nut possesses advantages below or effect:

1. rich in unrighted acid, such as linoleic acid, linolenic acid etc. in pine nut, blood fat can be reduced, prevent angiocardiopathy；

2. contained a large amount of mineral matters such as calcium, iron, phosphorus, potassium etc. in pine nut, can provide abundant nutritional labeling to body tissue, strong Muscles and bones, dispelling fatigue, there is great benefit to health of older persons；

3. in pine nut, content of vitamin E is high, plays the role of good softening blood vessel, delays senility, and is the preferable guarantor of the elderly Strong food, is also the preferable food of ladies' moistening skin beautifying；

4. SEMEN PINI KORAIENSIS is rich in fat oil, can relax bowel laxative and not hinder healthy tendency, and the empty constipation to old man's body, children's's body fluid deficiency constipation has Certain dietary function；

5. the fat constituent in pine nut is the unrighted acid such as oleic acid, linoleic acid, plays the role of good softening blood vessel, in being The preferable health food of the elderly；

6. the phosphorus in pine nut and Fe content enrich, and have benefiting action to brain and nerve, are the brain tonics of student and brain worker Good merchantable brand, also has good prevention effect to senile dementia.

7. pine nut is warm in nature, taste is sweet, enters liver, lung, large intestine channel；There is enriching yin nutrient solution, tonifying Qi and blood, moisturize effect of laxation； Cure mainly body after being ill empty, the illnesss such as skin loses and moistens, xeropulmonary cough, thirsty constipation, Light-headedness, spontaneous perspiration, palpitaition.

And nutritive value that Momordica grosvenori is wanted containing needed by human body is very high, wherein contain substantial amounts of vitamin C, fructose, grape Sugar, glucoside and protein etc..Momordica grosvenori has moistening lung and controls and cough, and the effect of quenching the thirst causes cough to because of dryness of the lung lung heat, edible arhat Fruit has good curative effect.Momordica grosvenori contains the sweetener of strong 300 times than sucrose, feels incomparable sweetness after entrance, but but not Produce substantial amounts of heat as sucrose, be very suitable for suffering from obesity, hypertension, diabetes etc. and be not suitable for sugar eater and eat!Sieve Chinese fruit also has spasmolysis and resistant function to the intestinal tube causing because of adrenaline is loose, allows intestinal tube oneself recover spontaneous activity, There is two-way tune effect to intestinal tube motion function.So with Momordica grosvenori replace part sucrose solve sugariness problem be one well Select.

Content of the invention

It is an object of the invention to provide the production method of a kind of pine nut tea vinegar drink, this production method can solve market On lack fragrance matter and the nutritional labeling of existing tealeaves, the problem having again the tea vinegar drink of the nutritional labeling of acetic acid, to obtain The good collection nutrition and health care of raciness, quality acts on the multi-functional beverage of one.

In order to solve the problems referred to above, the technical solution used in the present invention is: under the production method of this tea vinegar drink uses The raw material of row parts by weight:

10 parts～20 parts of pine nut, tealeaves 10 parts～20 parts, Momordica grosvenori 15 parts～20 parts, white sugar 5 parts～10 parts；

Production stage is as follows:

A, the weight weighing up tealeaves, pine nut, Momordica grosvenori and white sugar according to the parts by weight of above-mentioned each raw material respectively, sieve weighing up After Chinese fruit is broken and pot put into by other raw materials, and add the mountain spring water boiling of 400 parts～500 parts of parts by weight, boil to boiling And keep 30 minutes～60 minutes, it after naturally cooling down, is filtrated to get leaching liquor；

B, above-mentioned leaching liquor is poured into cleaning container in, access raw material gross weight 2%～3% acetic acid bacteria strain, after stirring, Capping fermentation, control product temperature, at 16 DEG C～28 DEG C, is fermented 10 days～25 days；

C, the feed liquid completing to obtain to step B fermentation carry out acid adjustment under the environment temperature of 16 DEG C～28 DEG C, control the total of feed liquid Acid content is 0.3g/100ml～1g/100ml, and soluble solid content is 3%～5%；

D, good for acid adjustment feed liquid is sterilized after, carry out sterile vacuum filling and get final product.

In the technical scheme of the production method of above-mentioned tea vinegar drink, more specifically technical scheme it may also is that in step A, The PH value of described mountain spring water is 7～7.5；When the total acid content of the feed liquid in described C step is less than 0.3g/100ml, to Feed liquid add citric acid or malic acid carry out acid adjustment；When the total acid content of the feed liquid that fermentation obtains is more than 1g/100ml, Hawthorn sugar or fructose is added to carry out acid adjustment in feed liquid.

Further: the sterilising temp of step D is 95 DEG C～110 DEG C, sterilization time is 4 seconds～30 seconds.

Further, when the feed liquid external packing in step D is plastic bottle, after filling bottle is sterilized, sterilizing Temperature is 95 DEG C～98 DEG C, and sterilization time is 20 minutes～30 minutes, and sterilizing naturally cools down and get final product after completing.

Further: described tealeaves is Iron Guanyin, oolong tea, black tea, green tea, the one in Pu'er tea.

Further: described acetic acid bacteria strain is AS1.41 acetic acid bacteria, Shanghai wine 1.01 acetic acid bacterias, Xu Shi acetic acid bacteria, line film acetic acid One in bacterium.

Owing to have employed technique scheme, the present invention compared with prior art has the advantages that

1st, the pine nut tea vinegar drink of the present invention is a kind of to collect the multifunctional beverage that nutrition and health care acts on one, with vegetal Tealeaves, the leaching liquor syrup of Momordica grosvenori ferment as acetic acid bacteria culture medium, and the tea vinegar drink of production has tealeaves, Momordica grosvenori Various fragrance matters and nutritional labeling, also have nutritional labeling and the appropriateness tart flavour of acetic acid, and its raciness, quality are good.

2nd, raw material is boiled to boiling and keeps 30-60 minute by the present invention, both can make tealeaves and Momordica grosvenori fragrance matter and Nutritional labeling can be completely dissolved in mountain spring water, boiling can be avoided again to cross and reduce the acquisition amount of leaching liquor for a long time；Nature before filtering Cooling can make fragrance matter and the nutritional labeling of tealeaves and Momordica grosvenori can be completely dissolved in mountain spring water further.

3rd, the pine nut tea vinegar drink of the present invention is a kind of novel healthy beverage, and it is to health care, the work(of beautifying face and moistering lotion Effect is notable；Can prevention and cure of cardiovascular disease, there is expansion blood vessel, increase CF, improve heart vigor, stimulating central nervous system System, reduce blood pressure and effect of cholesterol, softening blood vessel and diuresis and calmness；And have appetite-stimulating indigestion-relieving, activate blood circulation and disperse blood clots, relievining asthma Phlegm, suppression bacterium, the effect for the treatment of abdominal pain diarrhea；Its contained general flavone and the material such as vitamin C, carrotene can block simultaneously Reduce the generation of free radical, strengthen the immunity, anticancer and anti-aging of body；Institute's glucoside-containing, fructose, glucose, protein, fat Class moistens the lung and relieve the cough, the effect promoting the production of body fluid to quench thirst and relaxing bowel.Blood fat can be reduced, prevent angiocardiopathy；Strong muscles and bones, eliminates Fatigue, has great benefit to health of older persons；There iss good softening blood vessel, delay senility, be the reason of the elderly Think health food, be also the preferable food of ladies' moistening skin beautifying.

4th, in the present invention, tea vinegar drink replaces sucrose as sweetener with the Momordica grosvenori having health care to human body, reduces people Body is to sugared absorption, it is to avoid the injury to human body for the high sugar.

Detailed description of the invention

Below in conjunction with embodiment, the present invention is described in further detail:

Embodiment 1

The vinegar beverage of the present embodiment use following weight portion raw material: 20 parts of pine nut, tealeaves 20 parts, Momordica grosvenori 20 parts, white sugar 10 parts；

Its production stage is:

A, by the Momordica grosvenoris of 20 parts after broken the pine nut with 20 parts, the tealeaves of 20 parts and the white sugar of 10 parts put into pot and add 500 parts of pH values are the mountain spring water boiling of 7, boil to boiling and keep 45 minutes, then cooling down, be filtrated to get leaching liquor；

B, above-mentioned leaching liquor is poured in the container of cleaning, access and account for the AS1.41 acetic acid bacteria of raw material total amount 2.5%, stir After, capping fermentation, fermentation temperature is 16 DEG C～28 DEG C, fermentation time 25 days；

C, the feed liquid completing to obtain to the fermentation of step B carry out acid adjustment under the environment temperature of 16 DEG C～28 DEG C, control the total of feed liquid Acid content is 0.3g/100ml～1g/100ml, and soluble solid content is 3%～5%；When the total acid content of feed liquid is less than During 0.3g/100ml, citric acid is added to carry out acid adjustment in feed liquid；When the total acid content of the feed liquid obtaining of fermenting is more than 1g/ During 100ml, Hawthorn sugar is added to carry out acid adjustment in feed liquid；

D, sterilizing the feed liquid that acid adjustment is good, sterilising temp is 95 DEG C～110 DEG C, and sterilization time is 30 seconds, then carries out true Empty sterile filling, to obtain final product.

Embodiment 2

The vinegar beverage of the present embodiment use following weight portion raw material: 10 parts of pine nut, tealeaves 10 parts, Momordica grosvenori 15 parts, white sugar 5 Part；

Its production stage is:

A, the pine nut by broken for the Momordica grosvenoris of 15 parts rear and 10 parts, the tealeaves of 10 parts and the white sugar of 5 parts are put into pot and add 400 Part pH value is the mountain spring water boiling of 7.5, boils to boiling and keeps 30 minutes, then cooling down, be filtrated to get leaching liquor；

C, the feed liquid completing to obtain to the fermentation of step B carry out acid adjustment under the environment temperature of 16 DEG C～28 DEG C, control the total of feed liquid Acid content is 0.3g/100ml～1g/100ml, and soluble solid content is 3%～5%；When the total acid content of feed liquid is less than During 0.3g/100ml, malic acid is added to carry out acid adjustment in feed liquid；When the total acid content of the feed liquid obtaining of fermenting is more than 1g/ During 100ml, fructose is added to carry out acid adjustment in feed liquid；

D, sterilizing the feed liquid that acid adjustment is good, sterilising temp is 95 DEG C～110 DEG C, and sterilization time is 4 seconds；Then vacuum is carried out Aseptic plastic bottle is filling, and sterilization temperature is 95 DEG C～98 DEG C, and sterilizing time is 20 minutes, and sterilization naturally cools down and get final product after completing.

section.content: 本实用新型公开了种茶叶炒制机，涉及茶叶加工机械领域，包括灶台，所述灶台上设有炒锅，所述炒锅上方设有转动轴，所述转动轴上方设有驱动箱，所述驱动箱旁设有升降装置，所述驱动箱内设有驱动电机，所述转动轴下端设有锅铲，所述锅铲包括翻铲和揉铲，所述翻铲上方设有3‑6条翻炒臂，所述揉铲上设有揉珠，所述炒锅上设有倾倒鸭嘴口和倾倒臂，使用明火加工茶叶，通过可升降的驱动箱带动锅铲转动，通过电机带动翻炒臂上翻铲旋转带动炒锅内茶叶的翻动，而揉铲旋转时带动揉珠不断对茶叶进行揉捻，从而实现茶叶杀青炒制的操作模拟，能有效提高炒制效率和茶叶品质，将炒制完成的茶叶借助倾倒鸭嘴口和倾倒臂可以次性完全倒出，无残留，省力气。

The utility model discloses a tea stir -frying machine relates to tealeaves processing machinery field, including the top of a kitchen range, be equipped with the frying pan on the top of a kitchen range, the frying pan top is equipped with the axis of rotation, the axis of rotation top is equipped with the drive case, the other elevating gear that is equipped with of drive case, the drive incasement is equipped with driving motor, the axis of rotation lower extreme is equipped with the slice, the slice is including turning over the shovel and rubbing the shovel, be it equipped with 3 to turn over the shovel top 6 the strip turns over the stir -fry arm, rub to be equipped with on the shovel and rub the pearl, be equipped with on the frying pan and empty the duckbilled mouth and empty the arm, use naked light processing tealeaves, drive crossbar through the liftable moves the slice rotation, it turns over that the shovel is rotatory to drive stirring of in frying pan tealeaves on the arm to drive to turn over to fry through the motor, and rub the shovel and drive when rotatory and rub the pearl and constantly knead tealeaves, thereby realize the operation simulation of the tea wrap system of frying, can effectively improve and fry system efficiency and tea quality, the tealeaves that the system of will frying was accomplished can once only be poured with the help of empting the duckbilled mouth and empting the arm completely, the noresidue at harvest time, save the strength.

A kind of tea stir-frying machineTechnical field

This utility model relates to machine for processing tea field, is specifically related to a kind of tea stir-frying machine.

Background technology

China is the native place of tea, and tea making, the most thousand of years history of drinking tea, famous-object is assembled, mainly Kind has green tea, black tea, oolong tea, scented tea, Ramulus et Folium Mussaendae Pubescentis, yellow tea, postfermented tea.Therein green Tea is the most fermented tea made, and the most more natural materials remaining fresh leaf contains Tea polyphenols, catechin, chlorophyll, caffeine, aminoacid, vitamins and other nutritious components also More, anti-aging, anti-cancer, anticancer, sterilization, antiinflammatory etc. are had special-effect, is it Less than his teas.Green tea is with suitable And Development of Tea Shoot as raw material, through completing, kneading, does The Folium Camelliae sinensis that the typical process process such as dry is made.

In the conventional processes of Folium Camelliae sinensis, completing and kneading typically completes in tea stir-frying machine, Fresh Folium Camelliae sinensis after wilting fermentation constantly stir-fries in frying pan and kneads, institute in suppression fresh Folium Camelliae sinensis The organized enzyme contained and control oxidizing process, make the color of fresh Folium Camelliae sinensis not turn red obfuscation, it is ensured that green tea Color and taste quality.At present, the parch of high-grade Folium Camelliae sinensis is basic or is carried out by manual operations, Tea making teacher rule of thumb controls tea quality with maneuver, and production efficiency is the lowest, and tea quality Instability, is affected bigger by human factor.But on the substitution effects of existing tea stir-frying machine The most less desirable, it is impossible to the craft of simulation tea making teacher stir-fries and kneads action well, and Folium Camelliae sinensis exists When naked light stir-fries, more preferably, and the rare naked light of frying machine of used self-action enters Folium Camelliae sinensis mouthfeel Row heating, uses the cooking-pot type frying machine of open firing to be but difficult to when tea frying completes pour out tea Leaf.

Utility model content

A kind of tea stir-frying machine, including the kitchen range top, the described kitchen range top is provided with frying pan, on described frying pan Side is provided with rotary shaft, and described rotary shaft is arranged over driving box, is provided with lifting by described driving box Device, is provided with driving motor in described driving box, described driving motor is connected with rotary shaft, institute Stating rotary shaft lower end and be provided with slice, described slice includes turning over shovel and rubs shovel, described in turn over and set above shovel Have 3-6 bar to stir-fry arm, described in stir-fry arm and rub shovel and be connected with rotary shaft, described in rub shovel and be provided with Rubbing pearl, described frying pan is provided with topples over duck bill hole, and described frying pan is provided with topples over arm.

Preferably, described lowering or hoisting gear includes that slide rail and slide block, described slide rail and slide block are chimeric, Described slide block is connected with driving box.

Preferably, described in the arm that stir-fries be two-part, described in stir-fry arm first paragraph laterally down 15-25 ° of inclination, second segment to inferoanterior 30-45 ° inclination, described in stir-fry arm first paragraph and Connection angle between second segment is 50-60 °.

Preferably, the length of the described arm that stir-fries is identical, and the end of second segment is all in same Plane.

Preferably, described frying pan is toppled over duck bill hole and the radian toppling between arm is 90 °.

The utility model has the advantage of: rational in infrastructure, easy to use, use naked light processing tea Leaf, drives slice to rotate by liftable driving box, is driven by motor and turns on the arm that stir-fries Shovel rotarily drives stirring of Folium Camelliae sinensis in frying pan, and rubs to drive when shovel rotates and rub pearl and constantly enter Folium Camelliae sinensis Row is kneaded, thus realizes the operation simulation of tea green-keeping parch, can be effectively improved parch efficiency and Tea leaf quality, the Folium Camelliae sinensis that parch is completed by topple over duck bill hole and topple over arm can be the completeest Entirely pour out, noresidue, save the strength.

Fig. 2 is structural representation during a kind of tea stir-frying machine described in the utility model work.

Detailed description of the invention

For the technological means making this utility model realize, creation characteristic, to reach purpose easy with effect In clear understanding, below in conjunction with detailed description of the invention, this utility model is expanded on further.

As it is shown in figure 1, a kind of tea stir-frying machine, including the kitchen range top 1, the described kitchen range top 1 is provided with Frying pan 2, described frying pan 2 is arranged over rotary shaft 3, and described rotary shaft 3 is arranged over driving Case 4, described driving box 4 is other is provided with lowering or hoisting gear 5, is provided with driving electricity in described driving box 4 Machine 6, described driving motor 6 is connected with rotary shaft 3, and described rotary shaft 3 lower end is provided with slice 7, described slice 7 includes turning over shovel 8 and rubs shovel 9, described in turn over shovel 8 and be arranged over 3-6 bar and turn over Fry arm 10, described in stir-fry arm 10 and rub shovel 9 and be connected with rotary shaft 3, described in rub to shovel and set on 9 Rubbing pearl 11, described frying pan is provided with topples over duck bill hole 12, and described frying pan 2 is provided with topples over Arm 13.

Based on above-mentioned, this utility model drives slice to rotate by liftable driving box, passes through Motor drives to stir-fry and turns over shovel on arm and rotarily drive stirring of Folium Camelliae sinensis in frying pan, and rubs shovel when rotating Drive is rubbed pearl and is constantly kneaded Folium Camelliae sinensis, thus realizes the operation simulation of tea green-keeping parch, Can be effectively improved parch efficiency and tea leaf quality, Folium Camelliae sinensis parch completed is by toppling over duck bill hole Can the most completely pour out with toppling over arm, noresidue, save the strength.

section.content: 种松仁富硒奶茶由松子汁、富硒茶汁、牛奶调配而成，所述松子汁为长白山红松籽榨油后的松子饼打浆、过滤后得到的滤液；茶汁为玫瑰花瓣和紫阳富硒茶叶按定配比煮制、除渣后的滤液，其制备方法，包括松子汁的制备、茶汁的制备、松仁富硒奶茶的制备三个步骤，本发明兼具牛奶和茶的双重营养，并在传统奶茶的基础上加入了松子仁及“抗癌之王”硒元素，保健及口感集于体，工艺简单，成本低，并大大提高了松仁粕的附加值，具有广阔的市场前景。

A kind of pine nut selenium-rich milk tea is formed by pine-nut juice, selenium-rich tea juice, milk allotment, described pine-nut juice is the Semen Pini cake making beating after the oil expression of Korean Pine-deciduous Mixed Forest of Changbai Mountain seed, filter after the filtrate that obtains；Tea juice is the filtrate after roseleaf and Selenium-rich Tea In Ziyang County of Shaanxi boiling according to a certain ratio, slagging-off, its preparation method, including the preparation of pine-nut juice, the preparation of tea juice, three steps of preparation of pine nut selenium-rich milk tea, the present invention has the double nutrition of milk and tea concurrently, and adds Semen pini koraiensis and " anticancer king " selenium element on the basis of tradition milk tea, and health care and mouthfeel are integrated in one, technique is simple, low cost, and substantially increase the added value of the pine nut dregs of rice, there is wide market prospect.

A kind of pine nut selenium-rich milk tea and preparation technology thereofTechnical field

The invention belongs to beverage and preparation method thereof technical field, be specifically related to one and with pine nut as primary raw material and add rose Rare flower, green tea rich in selenium, the Semen pini koraiensis selenium-rich milk tea and preparation method thereof of milk.

Background technology

The nutritive value of Semen pini koraiensis is the highest, the most good medicinal efficacy, containing abundant oleum lini in Semen pini koraiensis Acid, linoleic acid etc. are multiple can keep human body cell film relative flow, esterification cholesterol in human body, reduction blood to glue Degree and denseness, the unsaturated fatty acid of raising brain cell activity.Semen pini koraiensis or the dry fruit of a kind of high protein content, And in Semen pini koraiensis albumen content ratio be suitable for the valine of human body needs, methionine, isoleucine, phenylalanine, Leucine, tryptophan, threonine, lysine etc. 8 kinds must aminoacid, indispensable each of the most a variety of human bodies Plant mineral and various trace element all has distribution in Semen pini koraiensis.Pine kernel protein, mineral, trace element etc. can Well promote the synthesis of protein in human body, the activity of some enzyme in energy human activin, human body oxytolerant can be increased and lack The ability of oxygen, the immunologic function of energy enhancing body, it is possible to slow down aging phase, additionally it is possible to auxiliary treatment senile chronic props up gas Guan Yan, bronchial asthma, rheumatic arthritis, constipation, neurasthenia, dryness accumulated in the stomach and intestine cough, dizziness and blurred vision etc..At present, Semen pini koraiensis, by substantial amounts of development and utilization, along with the rise of wholefood trend and popular, has regulation food nutrition Structure, the effect such as increase economic efficiency pine-seed oil by substantial amounts of research and production, cause under the accumulation of substantial amounts of Semen Pini cake Coming, cause the biggest waste, therefore, the redevelopment of Semen Pini cake and effectively utilizing becomes the focus of food research and bright Point.

The selenium element of " the anticancer king " that be referred to as in body trace element height in blood of human body is sent out with cancer Sick rate is closely bound up, and the antioxidase in animal and human body, the synthesis of selenium-P albumen are required for the participation of selenium element, selenium A series of redox reaction in energy balanced human.

Folium Camelliae sinensis contains the tea polyphenols of 20%～35%, six macrospecies essential amino acids, the organic acid (Herba Marsileae Quadrifoliae of about 3% Fruit acid, citric acid, succinic acid, oxalic acid, Palmic acid, hexenoic acid, linoleic acid etc.), the pectin of about 4%, 20～25% Saccharide, the pigment of about 1%, the aromatic substance of about 0.02%, the alkaloid of 2%～5% (caffeine, can Theobromine, choline, theophylline etc.), possibly together with vitamin, enzyme, glycoside and flavone compound.Have tea can refresh oneself, Expelling summer-heat, clear away heart-fire, reducing internal heat, improving eyesight, aid digestion, remove greasy, eliminating toxin and beautifying the skin, dry, quench the thirst.Tea polyphenols can have The harmful substance free radical produced in the removing body oxidation reaction process of effect, promotes that vivotoxin excretes, and then Delay the aging of body.The diffusion of tea polyphenols energy anticancer and deterioration, opposing harmful levels of pathogens enters body and can have Kill pathogenic bacteria to effect.Tea polyphenols also can suppress HIV (human immunodeficiency virus) to a certain extent.

Flos Rosae Rugosae have regulate the flow of vital energy, invigorate blood circulation, the function of regulating menstruation, to stomachache due to hyperactive liver-QI attacking the stomach, menoxenia, leucorrhea with red and white discharge, furuncle From the beginning of having unique curative effect with diseases such as traumatic injury, it may also be used for dietetic therapy, esohagismus can be treated cause as Flos Rosae Rugosae is made tea Upper abdomen distending pain in addition to medicinal, the aromatic oil refined from Flos Rosae Rugosae enjoys a good market both at home and abroad market, its price be gold 1～ 2 times, the most only world's rare spice, also have looks improving and the skin nourishing, anti-aging effects；Additionally, be also commonly used for confection, cake Select, the fine perfumery additive of beverage, champagne.

Milk tea is special due to mouthfeel, so quite being welcome by teenager.Milk tea has the double nutrition of milk and tea concurrently, It is one of daily life of a family cuisines, is in fashion the world.The present invention adds Semen pini koraiensis and " anticancer king " on the basis of tradition milk tea Selenium element, keeps healthy and mouthfeel is integrated in one, and technique is simple, low cost, and substantially increases the added value of the pine nut dregs of rice, There is wide market prospect.

Summary of the invention

The purpose of invention is to provide a kind of pine nut selenium-rich milk tea and preparation method thereof.

Pine nut selenium-rich milk tea prepared by the present invention is pale pink beverage, and product has plant material due Colophonium taste, allusion quotation The tea of type is fragrant, the fragrance of a flower, and delicate mouthfeel lubricates.In this product, main material is the pine nut dregs of rice extracting pine nut oil, is to squeezing The recycling of oil garbage, reduces the cost of beverage, and by adding milk, Flos Rosae Rugosae, tea rich in selenium, increases The trophism of beverage, pattern sense, breach the quagmire of tradition milk tea single pattern.

Pine nut selenium-rich milk tea preparation method of the present invention, including the preparation of 1. Pine nut kernal juice；2. the preparation of tea juice；③ The allotment of Semen pini koraiensis Rose Essentielle selenium-rich milk tea；4. the step such as homogenizing, canned, sterilization, particularly as follows:

The first step, prepares pine-nut juice:

(1) select: raw material is the Semen Pini cake after the oil expression of Korean Pine-deciduous Mixed Forest of Changbai Mountain seed, choose that dry, gloss is bright, granule Scattered Semen Pini cake, avoids humidity, color and luster dimness and sticks into the Semen Pini cake of bulk；

(2) clean: Semen Pini cake is placed in the warm water of about 20 DEG C, wash Semen Pini cake surface adhesive tape foreign material and Dust, then filters water；

(3) soak: the Semen pini koraiensis after cleaning adds 50～60 DEG C of water soaking about 10-15min of 5～7 times；

(4) micro-boil: precook in the hot water of 70～80 DEG C 10～15 minutes；

(5) corase grind: polish with beater；

(6) fine grinding: secondary is polished, and uses colloid mill fine grinding so that in juice, protein and lipochondrion are evenly；

(7) screenings separates: filters serosity with the gauze of 200 mesh of four layers, obtains pine-nut juice.

Second step, preparation tea juice:

(1) pulverize: roseleaf and Selenium-rich Tea In Ziyang County of Shaanxi are mixed in the ratio of 1:1,1:2,2:1, uses omnipotent powder Compound thing is pulverized by broken machine；

(2) extraction: the boiled water of add 20-50 times in above-mentioned mixed-powder 95 DEG C soaks 15-20 minute；

(3) filter: lixiviating solution filtered while hot, with the filtered through gauze of double-deck 200 mesh, slagging-off, obtain tea juice.

3rd step, the allotment of Semen pini koraiensis Rose Essentielle selenium-rich milk tea:

(1) proportioning raw materials: pine-nut juice 25-35 part, tea juice 20-28 part, milk 25-35 part, white sugar 5-8 Part, stabilising emulsifier 0.35-0.57 part；

(2) pretreatment of stabilising emulsifier: white sugar is the most uniformly mixed with emulsion stabilizer, adds suitable quantity of water, Prolong with Glass rod and stir a few clockwise, add in said milk tea after all dissolving.Wherein emulsion stabilizer is xanthan Glue 0.3-0.5 part and carrageenan 0.05-0.07 part.

(4) allotment: be stirred with homogenizer after each composition is added according to aforementioned proportion so that it is mixing is all Even.

4th step, homogenizing, canned, sterilization:

The milk tea obtained after dispensing carries out the homogenizing of 2～3 times, and homogenizing temperature is 70 DEG C～80 DEG C, and pressure is 25MPa ～30MPa.With carrying out fill, sealing at 70-80 DEG C；Sterilize under the conditions of 80-120 DEG C 25-35min.

Pine nut selenium-rich milk tea Middle nutrition component protein matter >=0.5%, tea polyphenols >=500mg/kg, Se content >= 0.04mg/kg。

Detailed description of the invention

Embodiment 1:

Semen Pini cake after oil expression adds 50 DEG C of water soaking 10min of 5 times, is then heated to 70 DEG C and micro-boils 10min； Beater is roughly ground, and by the filtered through gauze of four layer of 200 mesh after colloid mill fine grinding, obtains pine-nut juice.

Roseleaf and Selenium-rich Tea In Ziyang County of Shaanxi are mixed in the ratio of 1:1, are pulverized by compound thing with Universalpulverizer； The boiled water of add 20 times 95 DEG C soaks 15 minutes；Lixiviating solution filtered while hot, by the filtered through gauze of double-deck 200 mesh, Slagging-off, obtains tea juice.

By above-mentioned pine-nut juice 25 parts, tea juice 28 parts, 30 parts of milk, white sugar 6 parts, stabilising emulsifier 0.35 Allotment is uniformly for part (wherein xanthan gum 0.3 part and carrageenan 0.05 part)；Milk tea after allotment is in temperature 70 C, pressure Power 25MPa, carries out 3 homogenizing.Last fill at 70 DEG C, sealing；Sterilize under the conditions of 80 DEG C 35min.

Embodiment 2:

Semen Pini cake after oil expression adds 55 DEG C of water soaking 12min of 6 times, is then heated to 75 DEG C and micro-boils 12min； Beater is roughly ground, and by the filtered through gauze of four layer of 200 mesh after colloid mill fine grinding, obtains pine-nut juice.

Roseleaf and Selenium-rich Tea In Ziyang County of Shaanxi are mixed in the ratio of 1:2, are pulverized by compound thing with Universalpulverizer； The boiled water of add 30 times 95 DEG C soaks 15 minutes；Lixiviating solution filtered while hot, by the filtered through gauze of double-deck 200 mesh, Slagging-off, obtains tea juice.

By above-mentioned pine-nut juice 30 parts, tea juice 24 parts, 35 parts of milk, white sugar 5 parts, stabilising emulsifier 0.57 Part (xanthan gum 0.5 part and 0.07 part) allotment is uniformly；Milk tea after allotment temperature 80 DEG C, pressure 30MPa, Carry out 2 homogenizing.Last fill at 80 DEG C, sealing；Sterilize under the conditions of 120 DEG C 25min.

Embodiment 3:

Semen Pini cake after oil expression adds 60 DEG C of water soaking 15min of 7 times, is then heated to 80 DEG C and micro-boils 15min； Beater is roughly ground, and by the filtered through gauze of four layer of 200 mesh after colloid mill fine grinding, obtains pine-nut juice.

Roseleaf and Selenium-rich Tea In Ziyang County of Shaanxi are mixed in the ratio of 2:1, are pulverized by compound thing with Universalpulverizer； The boiled water of add 50 times 95 DEG C soaks 20 minutes；Lixiviating solution filtered while hot, by the filtered through gauze of double-deck 200 mesh, Slagging-off, obtains tea juice.

By above-mentioned pine-nut juice 35 parts, tea juice 20 parts, 25 parts of milk, white sugar 8 parts, stabilising emulsifier 0.46 Part (xanthan gum 0.4 part and carrageenan 0.06 part) allotment is uniformly；Milk tea after allotment is at temperature 80 DEG C, pressure 30MPa, carries out 3 homogenizing.Last fill at 80 DEG C, sealing；Sterilize under the conditions of 120 DEG C 25min.

1. a pine nut selenium-rich milk tea, its preparation technology includes:</claim-text>The first step, prepares pine-nut juice:</claim-text>(1) select: raw material is the Semen Pini cake after the oil expression of Korean Pine-deciduous Mixed Forest of Changbai Mountain seed, choose dry, gloss bright,
Granule scattered Semen Pini cake, avoids humidity, color and luster dimness and sticks into the Semen Pini cake of bulk；</claim-text>(2) clean: Semen Pini cake is placed in the warm water of 20 DEG C, wash Semen Pini cake surface adhesive tape foreign material and
Dust, then filters water；</claim-text>(3) soak: the Semen pini koraiensis after cleaning adds 50～60 DEG C of water soaking 10-15min of 5～7 times；</claim-text>(4) micro-boil: precook in the hot water of 70～80 DEG C 10～15 minutes；</claim-text>(5) corase grind: polish with beater；</claim-text>(6) fine grinding: secondary is polished, and uses colloid mill fine grinding so that in juice, protein and lipochondrion are more equal
Even；</claim-text>(7) screenings separates: filters serosity with the gauze of 200 mesh of four layers, obtains pine-nut juice；</claim-text>Second step, preparation tea juice:</claim-text>(1) pulverize: roseleaf and Selenium-rich Tea In Ziyang County of Shaanxi are mixed in the ratio of 1:1 or 1:2 or 2:1,
With Universalpulverizer, compound thing is pulverized；</claim-text>(2) extraction: the boiled water of add 20-50 times in above-mentioned mixed-powder 95 DEG C soaks 15-20 minute；</claim-text>(3) filter: lixiviating solution filtered while hot, with the filtered through gauze of double-deck 200 mesh, slagging-off, obtain tea juice；</claim-text>3rd step, the allotment of Semen pini koraiensis Rose Essentielle selenium-rich milk tea:</claim-text>(1) proportioning raw materials: pine-nut juice 25-35 part, tea juice 20-28 part, milk 25-35 part, white sugar
5-8 part, stabilising emulsifier 0.35-0.57 part；</claim-text>(2) pretreatment of stabilising emulsifier: the most uniformly mixed with emulsion stabilizer by white sugar, adds suitable
Amount water, prolongs with Glass rod and stirs a few clockwise, add in said milk tea after all dissolving, and wherein emulsifying is steady
Determining agent is xanthan gum 0.3-0.5 part and carrageenan 0.05-0.07 part；</claim-text>(4) allotment: be stirred with homogenizer after each composition is added according to aforementioned proportion so that it is mixed
Close uniformly；</claim-text>4th step, homogenizing, canned, sterilization:</claim-text>By the milk tea after allotment temperature 70 C～80 DEG C, under the conditions of pressure 25MPa～30MPa, carry out 2～3
Secondary homogenizing；Fill, sealing is carried out subsequently under the conditions of 70-80 DEG C；Sterilize under the conditions of 80-120 DEG C

0.04mg/kg。</claim-text>

inventionTitles.title: Passion fruit tea vinegar and method for preparing same
种百香果茶醋及其制备方法

address.address1: 532200 the Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region Chongzuo city town Nalong Jiangzhou District government dormitory District No. 301
Shenzhen xinchuangyou Intellectual Property Agency Co., Ltd.

event-title.$: REJECTION OF INVENTION PATENT APPLICATION AFTER PUBLICATION

section.content: The invention discloses passion fruit tea vinegar and a method for preparing the same. The passion fruit tea vinegar comprises passion fruits, tea, yeast, acetic acid bacteria, fructus crataegi, herba menthae powder, lemon juice, sugar and water. The method includes steps of decocting, fermenting, sterilizing, filling and the like to obtain the passion fruit tea vinegar. The passion fruit tea vinegar and the method have the advantages that raw materials for the passion fruit tea vinegar come from easily available sources, the method is simple, optional food additives are omitted, and the passion fruit tea vinegar contains abundant amino acid and diversified vitamins, is sour, sweet and delicious, has refreshing taste and is novel nutritional vinegar beverage; effects of decreasing lipid and pressures, clearing heat and moistening lungs to arrest cough can be realized by the beverage.
本发明公开了种百香果茶醋及其制备方法，所述百香果茶醋包括以下原料：百香果、茶、酵母菌、醋酸菌、山楂、薄荷粉、柠檬汁、糖、水，所述百香果茶醋是通过熬制、发酵、灭菌、灌装等步骤制得的。该百香果茶醋组成原料来源易得，制备方法简单，不含任何食品添加剂，且含有丰富的氨基酸和多种维生素，酸甜美味，口感清爽，是种新型的营养醋饮品。本发明的饮品具有降脂降压、清热润肺止咳的功效。

A kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar and preparation method thereof[technical field]

The invention belongs to technical field of beverage processing, be specifically related to a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar and preparation method thereof.

[background technology]

Passifolra edulis can be eaten raw, and its fruit contains 17 kinds of aminoacid of needed by human body, multiple Fructus Citri Limoniae juice and carotenoid, wherein Including the natural vitamin C enriched very much, just containing vitamin C in every 100 grams of fruit juice is 34.6 milligrams, also rich in Vitamin A, B1, B2 etc., additionally possibly together with material and trace element such as abundant calcium, phosphorus, ferrum and several amino acids.Soluble solid accounts for 5%-16%, total acid content is 3.8%-4%, and sweet acid is moderate.Nutritive value is the highest.Be raw material with Passifolra edulis, be processed into fruit juice, Fruit dew, fruit jam, fruit jelly, unique flavor.Peel can be made to extract pectin, and root, stem, leaf all can be used as medicine, and has anti-inflammatory analgetic, invigorates blood circulation by force The magical health-care effect such as body, enriching yin and nourishing kidney, blood fat-reducing blood pressure-decreasing, relieving alcoholic intoxication of refreshing oneself, allaying tiredness, eliminating toxin and beautifying the skin, enhancing immunity.

The health promoting beverage that Cha Shi various countries generally acknowledge, is referred to as " medicines of ten thousand diseases ", according to scientific investigations showed that, many containing tea in tea More than the 500 kind of active ingredient such as phenol, caffeine, the class soluble component that during wherein tea polyphenols is Folium Camelliae sinensis, content is most, is also tea Leaf plays its topmost material of health care effect, has antioxidation (elimination oxygen-derived free radicals), antiinflammatory, reduction cardiovascular diseases send out The multinomial effects such as sick probability, prophylaxis of cancer, blood fat reducing, minimizing body fat is formed, antibacterial, change intestinal microbial population is ecological.Hong Kong University Blood total cholesterol level can be made 25% is declined it was discovered by researchers that have tea.In addition a research is had tea and hypertension incidence relation Investigation find, the sickness rate of the people's hypertension not having tea is 10.55%, artificial 6.95% often had tea.

The most various about passiflora edulis drink product category, but the correlational study of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar drink is little, and big portion Dividing Passifolra edulis product all to be slatterned by peel, do not make full use of, cause product nutritive value the highest, mouthfeel is the best.

[summary of the invention]

The technical problem to be solved in the present invention is to provide a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar and preparation method thereof, to solve prior art Middle passiflora edulis drink product category is various, but processing technology is complex, and peel is all slatterned by major part Passifolra edulis product, Do not make full use of, cause the problems such as product nutritive value is the highest, and mouthfeel is the best.The Passifolra edulis tea vinegar constitutive material of the present invention comes Source is easy to get, and preparation method is simple, without any food additive, by Passifolra edulis skin and sarcocarp by secondary mixed fermentation, mixed with Folium Camelliae sinensis, Fructus Crataegi, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice, Herba Menthae powder make the Passifolra edulis more sour-sweet delicious food of tea vinegar, clean taste, are a kind of novel nutrition vinegar beverage Product.The beverage of the present invention also has blood fat-reducing blood pressure-decreasing, effect of clearing heat and moistening lung cough-relieving.

The present invention is achieved through the following technical solutions:

A kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, it is characterised in that in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 40-60 part, tea 6-10 part, Fructus Crataegi 4-6 part, Herba Menthae powder 2-4 part, sugar 10-15 part, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 5-7 part, water 60-80 part.

Preferably, in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 45-55 part, tea 7-9 Part, Fructus Crataegi 4-5 part, Herba Menthae powder 3-4 part, sugar 10-12 part, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 5-6 part, water 65-75 part.

Preferably, in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 50 parts, tea 8 parts, mountain Short, bristly hair or beard 5 parts, Herba Menthae powder 3 parts, sugar 12 parts, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 6 parts, 70 parts of water.

Preferably, described tea is any one in green tea, black tea, Jasmine tea.

Preferably, the described water used by Passifolra edulis tea vinegar is distilled water.

The present invention also proposes the preparation method of a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, comprises the following steps:

S1: Passifolra edulis is cleaned, and is separated with peel by sarcocarp, and peel does after crust processes and obtains peel meat；

S2: peel meat, Fructus Jujubae, Fructus Crataegi are cut into strip and put in marmite, adds tea, water boils together with crystal sugar, cooling Rear filtration, takes filtrate access yeast and carries out prior fermentation, obtain passion fruit fermentation liquor A；

S3: the sarcocarp in step S1 and Fructus Citri Limoniae juice, Herba Menthae powder, water are mixed and stirred for by weight uniformly, accesses acetic acid Bacterium carries out later stage one time fermentation, obtains passion fruit fermentation liquor B；

S4: passion fruit fermentation liquor A of step S2 gained is joined after carrying out in passion fruit fermentation liquor B of step S3 gained Phase ferment in second time, carries out sterilizing after having fermented, fill obtains Passifolra edulis tea vinegar finished product.

Preferably, the time that boils in step S2 is 5-6h, and temperature controls at 60-70 DEG C.

Preferably, the 2%-4% that yeast inoculum concentration is passion fruit fermentation liquor A cumulative volume in step S2, prior fermentation Temperature is 25-28 DEG C, and fermentation time is 20-30h.

Preferably, in step S3, acetic acid bacteria inoculum concentration is the 3%-5% of passion fruit fermentation liquor B cumulative volume, one time fermentation temperature Degree is for 30-35 DEG C, and fermentation time is 20-30h.

Preferably, in step S4, ferment in second time temperature is 28-35 DEG C, and fermentation time is 3-5 days, and sterilizing is that high-temperature instantaneous goes out Bacterium, described high temperature is 100-120 DEG C, time 4-8s.

The method have the advantages that

1, Passifolra edulis skin and sarcocarp are passed through secondary mixed fermentation by the Passifolra edulis tea vinegar of the present invention, mixed with Folium Camelliae sinensis, Fructus Crataegi, lemon Lemon juice, Herba Menthae powder make the Passifolra edulis more sour-sweet delicious food of tea vinegar, clean taste, are a kind of novel nutrition vinegar beverages.The present invention's Beverage also has blood fat-reducing blood pressure-decreasing, effect of clearing heat and moistening lung cough-relieving.

2, the Passifolra edulis tea vinegar constitutive material source of the present invention is easy to get, and preparation method is simple, and low cost, without any food Additive, it is easy to accomplish industrialization produces.

[detailed description of the invention]

Embodiment 1

A kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, it is characterised in that in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 40 parts, green tea 6 parts, Fructus Crataegi 4 parts, Herba Menthae powder 2 parts, 10 parts of crystal sugar, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 5 parts, distilled water 60 parts.

The preparation method of described a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, comprises the following steps:

S1: Passifolra edulis is cleaned, and is separated with peel by sarcocarp, and peel does after crust processes and obtains peel meat；

S2: peel meat, Fructus Jujubae, Fructus Crataegi are cut into strip and put in marmite, add green tea, water and crystal sugar and boil at 60 DEG C 6h, after cold filtration, takes filtrate and accesses the yeast of 2%, carry out prior fermentation 30h, obtain passion fruit fermentation liquor at 25 DEG C A；

S3: the sarcocarp in step S1 and Fructus Citri Limoniae juice, Herba Menthae powder, water are mixed and stirred for by weight uniformly, accesses 3% Acetic acid bacteria, carries out later stage one time fermentation 30h at 30 DEG C, obtains passion fruit fermentation liquor B；

S4: passion fruit fermentation liquor A of step S2 gained joins passion fruit fermentation liquor B of step S3 gained, at 28 DEG C Carry out later-stage secondary ferment 5 days, after having fermented under 100 DEG C of high temperature sterilizing 8s, fill obtains Passifolra edulis tea vinegar finished product.

Embodiment 2

A kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, it is characterised in that in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 45 parts, black tea 7 parts, Fructus Crataegi 5 parts, Herba Menthae powder 3 parts, 11 parts of crystal sugar, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 6 parts, distilled water 65 parts.

The preparation method of described a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, comprises the following steps:

S1: Passifolra edulis is cleaned, and is separated with peel by sarcocarp, and peel does after crust processes and obtains peel meat；

S2: peel meat, Fructus Jujubae, Fructus Crataegi are cut into strip and put in marmite, add black tea, water and crystal sugar and boil at 63 DEG C 5.7h, cooled and filtered, take filtrate and access the yeast of 2%, at 26 DEG C, carry out prior fermentation 27h, obtain Passifolra edulis fermentation Liquid A；

S3: the sarcocarp in step S1 and Fructus Citri Limoniae juice, Herba Menthae powder, water are mixed and stirred for by weight uniformly, accesses 3% Acetic acid bacteria, carries out later stage one time fermentation 28h at 32 DEG C, obtains passion fruit fermentation liquor B；

S4: passion fruit fermentation liquor A of step S2 gained joins passion fruit fermentation liquor B of step S3 gained, at 30 DEG C Carry out later-stage secondary ferment 4 days, after having fermented under 120 DEG C of high temperature sterilizing 4s, fill obtains Passifolra edulis tea vinegar finished product.

Embodiment 3

A kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, it is characterised in that in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 50 parts, green tea 8 parts, Fructus Crataegi 5 parts, Herba Menthae powder 3 parts, 12 parts of crystal sugar, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 6 parts, distilled water 70 parts.

The preparation method of described a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, comprises the following steps:

S1: Passifolra edulis is cleaned, and is separated with peel by sarcocarp, and peel does after crust processes and obtains peel meat；

S2: peel meat, Fructus Jujubae, Fructus Crataegi are cut into strip and put in marmite, add green tea water and crystal sugar boils at 65 DEG C 5.5h, cooled and filtered, take filtrate and access the yeast of 3%, at 27 DEG C, carry out prior fermentation 25h, obtain Passifolra edulis fermentation Liquid A；

S3: the sarcocarp in step S1 and Fructus Citri Limoniae juice, Herba Menthae powder, water are mixed and stirred for by weight uniformly, accesses 3.5% Acetic acid bacteria, carry out later stage one time fermentation 25h at 33 DEG C, obtain passion fruit fermentation liquor B；

S4: passion fruit fermentation liquor A of step S2 gained joins passion fruit fermentation liquor B of step S3 gained, at 28 DEG C Carry out later-stage secondary ferment 5 days, after having fermented under 120 DEG C of high temperature sterilizing 4s, fill obtains Passifolra edulis tea vinegar finished product.

Embodiment 4

A kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, it is characterised in that in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 55 parts, Jasmine tea 9 parts, Fructus Crataegi 6 parts, Herba Menthae powder 4 parts, 14 parts of crystal sugar, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 7 parts, distilled water 75 parts.

The preparation method of described a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, comprises the following steps:

S1: Passifolra edulis is cleaned, and is separated with peel by sarcocarp, and peel does after crust processes and obtains peel meat；

S2: peel meat, Fructus Jujubae, Fructus Crataegi are cut into strip and put in marmite, add Jasmine tea, water and crystal sugar at 67 DEG C Boil 5.8h, cooled and filtered, take filtrate and access the yeast of 4%, at 28 DEG C, carry out prior fermentation 20h, obtain Passifolra edulis Fermentation liquid A；

S3: the sarcocarp in step S1 and Fructus Citri Limoniae juice, Herba Menthae powder, water are mixed and stirred for by weight uniformly, accesses 4% Acetic acid bacteria, carries out later stage one time fermentation 20h at 35 DEG C, obtains passion fruit fermentation liquor B；

S4: passion fruit fermentation liquor A of step S2 gained joins passion fruit fermentation liquor B of step S3 gained, at 33 DEG C Carry out later-stage secondary ferment 4 days, after having fermented under 110 DEG C of high temperature sterilizing 6s, fill obtains Passifolra edulis tea vinegar finished product.

Embodiment 5

A kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, it is characterised in that in units of weight portion, described Passifolra edulis tea vinegar includes following raw material: Passifolra edulis 60 parts, black tea 10 parts, Fructus Crataegi 6 parts, Herba Menthae powder 4 parts, 15 parts of crystal sugar, Fructus Citri Limoniae juice 7 parts, distilled water 80 parts.

The preparation method of described a kind of Passifolra edulis tea vinegar, comprises the following steps:

S1: Passifolra edulis is cleaned, and is separated with peel by sarcocarp, and peel does after crust processes and obtains peel meat；

S2: peel meat, Fructus Jujubae, Fructus Crataegi are cut into strip and put in marmite, add black tea, water and crystal sugar and boil at 70 DEG C 5h, cooled and filtered, take filtrate and access the yeast of 4%, at 28 DEG C, carry out prior fermentation 20h, obtain passion fruit fermentation liquor A；

S3: the sarcocarp in step S1 and Fructus Citri Limoniae juice, Herba Menthae powder, water are mixed and stirred for by weight uniformly, accesses 5% Acetic acid bacteria, carries out later stage one time fermentation 20h at 35 DEG C, obtains passion fruit fermentation liquor B；

S4: passion fruit fermentation liquor A of step S2 gained joins passion fruit fermentation liquor B of step S3 gained, at 35 DEG C Carry out later-stage secondary ferment 3 days, after having fermented under 120 DEG C of high temperature sterilizing 4s, fill obtains Passifolra edulis tea vinegar finished product.

Above content it cannot be assumed that the present invention be embodied as be confined to these explanation, technology belonging to the present invention is led For the those of ordinary skill in territory, without departing from the inventive concept of the premise, it is also possible to make some simple deduction or replace, All should be considered as belonging to the scope of patent protection that the present invention is determined by the claims submitted to.

section.content: 本发明公开了种松针茶醋饮料的制备方法，本发明松针茶醋饮料由松针、茶叶、罗汉果、白糖和山泉水制备而成，制备方法为：将松针和罗汉果粉碎，将松针、茶叶、罗汉果和白糖放入锅内，加入山泉水煮制，冷却，过滤，收集浸提液，接入醋酸菌发酵，收集发酵料液；调整所述发酵料液的酸度和可溶性固形物的含量，灭菌，真空无菌灌装。与现有技术相比，本发明提供种集营养和保健作用于体的多功能饮料，用植物性的茶叶，松针和罗汉果的浸提液糖水作为醋酸菌培养基进行发酵，制备的茶醋饮料有茶叶，松针和罗汉果的各种香味物质和营养成分，还具有醋酸的营养成分和适度酸味，同时解决了现有茶醋饮料缺乏祛风活血和润肺止咳的功效的问题。

The invention discloses the preparation method of a kind of pine needle tea vinegar beverage, pine needle tea vinegar beverage of the present invention is prepared from by pine needle, tealeaves, Momordica grosvenori, white sugar and mountain spring water, preparation method is: pulverize pine needle and Momordica grosvenori, pine needle, tealeaves, Momordica grosvenori and white sugar are put into pot, adds mountain spring water boiling, cooling, filter, collect leaching liquor, access acetic acid bacteria fermentation, collect fermented feed liquid；Adjusting the acidity of described fermented feed liquid and the content of soluble solid, sterilizing, sterile vacuum is filling.Compared with prior art, the present invention provides and a kind of collects the multifunctional beverage that nutrition and health care acts on one, use vegetal tealeaves, the leaching liquor syrup of pine needle and Momordica grosvenori ferments as acetic acid bacteria culture medium, the tea vinegar drink of preparation has tealeaves, the various fragrance matter of pine needle and Momordica grosvenori and nutritional labeling, also have nutritional labeling and the appropriateness tart flavour of acetic acid, solve existing tea vinegar drink simultaneously and lack expelling wind and activating blood flow and the problem of the effect moistening the lung and relieve the cough.

The production method of pine needle tea vinegar beverageTechnical field

The present invention relates to drink processing technique field, the preparation method of especially a kind of pine needle tea vinegar beverage.

Background technology

Tea and vinegar are the necessitys that people live, and vinegar because rich in multiple organic acids, having various health care functions, tea to human body In leaf containing catechin, Flavonoid substances, caffeine, polysaccharide, theophylline, theobromine, choline, cholestenone, caffeine, inositol, The Multiple components such as folic acid, pantothenic acid, multivitamin, protein and amino acid, possibly together with the calcium beneficial to human body, phosphorus, iron, fluorine, 27 kinds of mineral matters such as iodine, manganese, molybdenum, zinc, its nutrition is very abundant.

The patent application of Application No. 201510215943.0 discloses the preparation method of a kind of grape vinegar beverage, this patent The deficiency that application exists is to lack expelling wind and activating blood flow and the effect moistening the lung and relieve the cough.

Content of the invention

It is an object of the invention to provide the preparation method of a kind of pine needle tea vinegar beverage, the method is mainly former with pine needle first Tea vinegar drink prepared by material, lacks expelling wind and activating blood flow and the problem of the effect that moistens the lung and relieve the cough to solve existing tea vinegar drink simultaneously.

In order to solve the problems referred to above, the technical solution used in the present invention is:

This pine needle tea vinegar beverage includes the raw material of following parts by weight: 10 parts～20 parts of pine needle, tealeaves 10 parts～20 parts, arhat Really 5 parts～10 parts, white sugar 5 parts～10 parts；

Preparation method is following steps:

A, weigh each raw material according to above-mentioned parts by weight；

B, by Momordica grosvenori pulverize；

C, by described tealeaves, described pine needle, pulverize after Momordica grosvenori and described white sugar put into pot, be subsequently adding 400 parts～500 The mountain spring water boiling of part, boils and keeps 30 minutes～60 minutes, naturally cooling down, filter, collect leaching liquor；

D, pour described leaching liquor into sterilizing after container in, access acetic acid bacteria, stir, sealed fermenting, control fermentation temperature Degree is 16 DEG C～28 DEG C, and fermentation time is 10 days～25 days, obtains fermented feed liquid；

E, under the environment temperature of 16 DEG C～28 DEG C, adjust the acidity of described fermented feed liquid so that total acid content is 0.3 gram/100 Milliliter～1 gram/100 milliliters, and the content regulating soluble solid is 3%～5%；

F, sterilizing, sterile vacuum is filling, to obtain final product.

In technique scheme, more specifically technical scheme is it may also is that the inoculum concentration of acetic acid bacteria in D step is raw material The 2%～3% of gross weight.

Further, the pH value of mountain spring water is 7～7.5.

Further, described tealeaves is Iron Guanyin, oolong tea, black tea, green tea, the one in Pu'er tea.Further, E The method of step regulation acidity is: when the total acid of D step gained fermented feed liquid contains

When amount is less than 0.3 gram/100 milliliters, add citric acid or malic acid to regulate acidity in fermented feed liquid；Work as fermentation material When the total acid content of liquid is more than 1 gram/100 milliliters, add glucose or fructose to regulate acidity in fermented feed liquid.

Further, in F step, sterilising temp is 95 DEG C～110 DEG C, and sterilization time is 4 seconds～30 seconds.

Further, when F step plastic bottle carries out filling, then need again filling after plastic bottle body is sterilized, sterilizing Temperature is 95 DEG C～98 DEG C, and sterilization time is 20 minutes～30 minutes.

Owing to have employed technique scheme, the present invention compared with prior art has the advantages that

1st, the present invention uses the leaching liquor of pine needle, tealeaves, Momordica grosvenori and white sugar to send out as acetic acid bacteria first

The matrix of ferment, pine needle can play eliminating toxic dampness and heat, effect of benefit gas, and pine needle has the benefit promoted longevity, often eat pine needle we Resistivity and the immunocompetence of health can be improved；Momordica grosvenori contains substantial amounts of vitamin C, fructose, glucose, glucoside and egg White matter, has moistening lung and controls the effect coughed, and Momordica grosvenori can also have spasmolysis and opposing to make to the intestinal tube causing because of adrenaline is loose With, allow intestinal tube recover spontaneous activity, there is two-way tune effect to intestinal tube motion function.Therefore the present invention have enriching yin qi-restoratives and The effect moistening the lung and relieve the cough.

2nd, raw material boiled to boiling and keep 30 minutes～60 minutes, both can make the fragrance thing of pine needle, tealeaves and Momordica grosvenori Matter and nutritional labeling can be completely dissolved in mountain spring water, boiling can be avoided again to cross and reduce the acquisition amount of leaching liquor for a long time；Before filtration Naturally cooling can make the fragrance matter of pine needle, tealeaves and Momordica grosvenori and nutritional labeling can be completely dissolved in mountain spring water further.

3rd, pine needle tea vinegar beverage of the present invention uses has the Momordica grosvenori of health care to replace there is injury to healthy to human body Sucrose, can be used as sweetener strengthening the sugariness of beverage, and play moistening lung and control the effect coughed, quench the thirst.

Detailed description of the invention

Below in conjunction with embodiment, the invention will be further described:

Embodiment 1

The pine needle tea vinegar beverage of the present embodiment includes following raw material: pine needle 10kg, black tea 10kg, Momordica grosvenori 15kg, white sugar 5kg；

Preparation method is:

A, weigh each raw material according to above-mentioned parts by weight；

B, by Momordica grosvenori pulverize；

C, the Momordica grosvenori after above-mentioned black tea, pine needle, pulverizing and above-mentioned white sugar being put into pot, being subsequently adding 400kg, pH value is 7 Mountain spring water boiling, boil and keep 30 minutes, naturally cooling down, filtering, collecting leaching liquor；

D, pour above-mentioned leaching liquor into sterilizing after container in, access AS1.41 acetic acid bacteria, the inoculum concentration of this acetic acid bacteria is raw material The 2% of gross weight, stirs, sealed fermenting, and control fermentation temperature is 16 DEG C, and fermentation time is 10 days, obtains fermented feed liquid；

E, under the environment temperature of 16 DEG C, adjust the acidity of above-mentioned fermented feed liquid so that total acid content is 0.3 gram/100 milliliters, And the content regulating soluble solid is 3%；

F, sterilizing, sterile vacuum is filling, and sterilising temp is 95 DEG C, and sterilization time is 4 seconds, to obtain final product.

Embodiment 2

The pine needle tea vinegar beverage of the present embodiment includes following raw material: pine needle 20kg, green tea 20kg, Momordica grosvenori 20kg, white sugar 10kg；

Preparation method is:

C, the Momordica grosvenori after above-mentioned green tea, pine needle, pulverizing and above-mentioned white sugar being put into pot, being subsequently adding 500kg, pH value is The mountain spring water boiling of 7.5, boils and keeps 60 minutes, naturally cooling down, filter, collect leaching liquor；

D, pour above-mentioned leaching liquor into sterilizing after container in, access Xu Shi acetic acid bacteria, the inoculum concentration of this acetic acid bacteria is that raw material is total The 2.5% of weight, stirs, sealed fermenting, and control fermentation temperature is 22 DEG C, and fermentation time is 17 days, obtains fermented feed liquid；

E, under the environment temperature of 22 DEG C, adjust the acidity of above-mentioned fermented feed liquid so that total acid content is 1 gram/100 milliliters, and The content of regulation soluble solid is 5%；

F, sterilizing, sterile vacuum is filling, and sterilising temp is 110 DEG C, and sterilization time is 30 seconds, to obtain final product.

Embodiment 3

The pine needle tea vinegar beverage of the present embodiment includes following raw material: pine needle 15kg, Iron Guanyin 15kg, Momordica grosvenori 17kg, white sugar 7kg；

Preparation method is:

A, weigh each raw material according to above-mentioned parts by weight；

B, by Momordica grosvenori pulverize；

C, the Momordica grosvenori after above-mentioned Iron Guanyin, pine needle, pulverizing and above-mentioned white sugar are put into pot, be subsequently adding 450kg, pH value It is the mountain spring water boiling of 7.3, boil and keep 45 minutes, naturally cooling down, filter, collect leaching liquor；

D, pour above-mentioned leaching liquor into sterilizing after container in, access Shanghai make 1.01 acetic acid bacterias, the inoculum concentration of this acetic acid bacteria is former The 3% of material gross weight, stirs, sealed fermenting, and control fermentation temperature is 28 DEG C, and fermentation time is 25 days, obtains fermentation material Liquid；

E, under the environment temperature of 28 DEG C, adjust the acidity of above-mentioned fermented feed liquid so that total acid content is 1 gram/100 milliliters, and The content of regulation soluble solid is 5%；

F, sterilizing, sterile vacuum plastic bottle filling, sterilising temp is 95 DEG C, and sterilization time is 20 minutes, after naturally cooling down i.e. ?.

Embodiment 4

The pine needle tea vinegar beverage of the present embodiment includes following raw material: pine needle 10kg, Pu'er tea 10kg, Momordica grosvenori 15kg, white sugar 5kg；

Preparation method is:

A, weigh each raw material according to above-mentioned parts by weight；

B, by Momordica grosvenori pulverize；

C, the Momordica grosvenori after above-mentioned Pu'er tea, pine needle, pulverizing and above-mentioned white sugar are put into pot, be subsequently adding 400kg, pH value It is the mountain spring water boiling of 7.2, boil and keep 40 minutes, naturally cooling down, filter, collect leaching liquor；

D, pour above-mentioned leaching liquor into sterilizing after container in, access line film acetic acid bacteria, the inoculum concentration of this acetic acid bacteria is that raw material is total The 3% of weight, stirs, sealed fermenting, and control fermentation temperature is 16 DEG C, and fermentation time is 25 days, obtains fermented feed liquid；

E, under the environment temperature of 16 DEG C, adjust the acidity of above-mentioned fermented feed liquid so that total acid content is 1 gram/100 milliliters, and The content of regulation soluble solid is 5%；

F, sterilizing, sterile vacuum plastic bottle filling, sterilising temp is 98 DEG C, and sterilization time is 30 minutes, after naturally cooling down i.e. ?.

Embodiment 5

The pine needle tea vinegar beverage of the present embodiment includes following raw material: pine needle 15kg, oolong tea 15kg, Momordica grosvenori 17kg, white sugar 7kg；

Preparation method is:

A, weigh each raw material according to above-mentioned parts by weight；

B, by Momordica grosvenori pulverize；

C, the Momordica grosvenori after above-mentioned oolong tea, pine needle, pulverizing and above-mentioned white sugar are put into pot, be subsequently adding 450kg, pH value It is the mountain spring water boiling of 7.3, boil and keep 45 minutes, naturally cooling down, filter, collect leaching liquor；

D, pour above-mentioned leaching liquor into sterilizing after container in, access Shanghai make 1.01 acetic acid bacterias, the inoculum concentration of this acetic acid bacteria is former The 3% of material gross weight, stirs, sealed fermenting, and control fermentation temperature is 28 DEG C, and fermentation time is 25 days, obtains fermentation material Liquid；

E, under the environment temperature of 28 DEG C, adjust the acidity of above-mentioned fermented feed liquid so that total acid content is 1 gram/100 milliliters, and The content of regulation soluble solid is 5%；

F, sterilizing, sterile vacuum plastic bottle filling, sterilising temp is 95 DEG C, and sterilization time is 20 minutes, after naturally cooling down i.e. ?.

In embodiment 1 to embodiment 5, the method for E step regulation acidity is: when the total acid of D step gained fermented feed liquid contains When amount is less than 0.3 gram/100 milliliters, add citric acid or malic acid to regulate acidity in fermented feed liquid；When fermented feed liquid When total acid content is more than 1 gram/100 milliliters, add glucose or fructose to regulate acidity in fermented feed liquid.

It is below clinical testing part:
