inventionTitles.title: Application of Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide as antitumor chemotherapy drug synergist and antitumor drug
龙须菜多糖作为抗肿瘤化疗药增效剂的应用及抗肿瘤药物

address.address1: 200240 No. 800, Dongchuan Road, Shanghai, Minhang District
Shanghai Han sound Intellectual Property Agency Co., Ltd.

event-title.$: REJECTION OF INVENTION PATENT APPLICATION AFTER PUBLICATION
ENTRY INTO FORCE OF REQUEST FOR SUBSTANTIVE EXAMINATION

section.content: 本发明提供了种龙须菜多糖的应用以及含有龙须菜多糖的抗肿瘤药物，该应用为龙须菜多糖作为增效剂在抗肿瘤药物制备中的应用，该抗肿瘤药物包含有龙须菜多糖增效剂、抗肿瘤活性成分以及药学上可接受的辅料。本发明首次发现海藻龙须菜多糖与化疗药紫杉醇、氟尿嘧啶、甲氨蝶呤和顺铂等联合使用可以增加化疗药治疗肿瘤的效果。龙须菜多糖与化疗药联用对于多个不同组织来源的肿瘤细胞具有抑制肿瘤增殖和活性的作用，包括肺癌、胃癌和宫颈癌等，龙须菜多糖对化疗药的增效作用呈剂量依赖性，且龙须菜多糖体外细胞实验中工作浓度未见毒性，具有药源丰富、安全无毒的特征，可开发为用于抗肿瘤化疗药增效剂的抗肿瘤药物或预防保健品，具有临床应用前景。

The invention provides application of Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide and an antitumor drug containing Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide. The application refers to application of the Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide as a synergist in antitumor drug preparation. The antitumor drug contains a Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide synergist, antitumor active components and pharmaceutically acceptable excipients. The invention for the first time finds that combined use of seaweed Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide with chemotherapy drugs paclitaxel, fluorouracil, methotrexate, cisplatin and the like can increase the treatment effect of chemotherapy drugs on tumors. The combined use of Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide with chemotherapy drugs can achieve the effect of inhibiting tumor proliferation and activity on a plurality of tumor cells with different tissue origins, including lung cancer, gastric cancer, cervical cancer and the like, the synergistic effect of Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide on chemotherapy drugs is dose-dependent, and in Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide in-vitro cell experiments, the working concentration does not show toxicity, with the characteristics of rich medicine sources, safety and no toxicity, the Gracilariopsis lemaneiformis polysaccharide can be developed into antitumor drugs or preventive health care products used for antitumor chemotherapy drug synergists, and has clinical application prospect.

Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is as the application of anti-tumor chemotherapeutic medicine synergist and antitumor drugTechnical field

The present invention relates to the application of a kind of marine red alga Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide and the antitumor drug containing Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide, belong to In biomedicine field, the especially marine Chinese medicine technical field to chemotherapy of tumors medicine potentiation.

Background technology

Utilize resourceful Sargassum to develop low toxicity, efficient antitumor drug is the hot topic that new type natural active medicine is studied Field.Common tumor chemotherapeutic drug Therapeutic Method is effective but side effect is bigger.Chinese medicine auxiliary western medicine tumor is increasing Intense prior chemotherapy curative effect of medication, improve immunity of organisms, extend life cycle, reduce recurrence and metastatic rate and alleviate the aspects such as side effect There is positive meaning.Liu Ji etc. report curcumin and the effect of chemotherapeutic ametycin anti-gastric cancer cell are had enhancing Effect.Deng Xiulian etc. find that mifepristone acts in Treatment of Malignant Trophoblastic Diseases as chemical-therapy synergistic agent, can be substantially Improve chemotherapy effect, but the most notable to untoward reaction abated effect.Grandson is superfine using caffeine as synergist, combined with taxol, Can substantially suppress the propagation of osteosarcoma cell and promote its apoptosis.But the most conventional chemotherapeutic synergist is mostly chemistry conjunction Become thing, the defect such as have that toxic and side effects is big, active ingredient extraction purification preparation process complicated or cost is bigger.

From developing original new drug angle, the research of marine drug is that exploitation is lived with the new type natural that Chinese medicine is source One of the focus of property medicine and important directions.The most increasing about the report of Sargassum antitumor drug, China Marine site is vast, and marine algae resource enriches, and utilizes algae to produce antitumorigenic substance the most potential.If can be by resourceful sea Algae exploitation is antitumor drug, will reduce the cost of new drug development and exploitation.Thallus Gracilariae (Gracilariopsis Lemaneiformis) be Rhodophyta, true Rhodophyceae, Gigartinales, Gracilaria tenuistipitata section, Gracilaria tangleweed, have another name called Pelvetia siliquosa Tseng et C. F. Chang, Deliver vegetables in sea, phoenix dish, line dish or Gracilaria tenuistipitata etc., is distributed mainly on China Shandong, Liaoning, Jiangsu, Fujian, Hainan etc. coastal Area.Thallus Gracilariae nature and flavor are sweet, cold, mainly enter Liver Channel, have aid digestion, solve long-pending greasy, bowel relieving harmonization of the stomach hemostasis blood pressure lowering, soft Heavily fortified point reduces phlegm, effect of clearing away heat and promoting diuresis, antalgic.As marine pharmaceutical resource, Thallus Gracilariae is red rich in active polysaccharide, algae Albumen and trace element etc., have the biological action of uniqueness, has been used to auxiliary and has treated multiple disease.Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide For native compound, hence it is evident that be different from conventional cell toxicant series antineoplastic medicament, and Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is as chemotherapeutic synergist There is not been reported in the medicinal application of class.Due to Sargassum Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide, to have non-toxic efficient, easily prepared, medicine source abundant Feature, it is possible to increase tumour patient quality of life, resists Large dose chemoradiotherapy side effects of pharmaceutical drugs, therefore can be as anti-swollen The preferable synergist of tumor chemotherapeutic, and will play a significant role in clinical antineoplastic is treated.

Summary of the invention

In order to open up the medical value of marine Chinese medicine anti-tumor active substance further, the invention provides a kind of red algae The new application of class plant Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide, i.e. Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide as anti-tumor chemotherapeutic medicine synergist in antitumor drug system Application in Bei and the antitumor drug containing Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide.

Present invention research is first by Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide and anti-tumor chemotherapeutic medicine paclitaxel, fluorouracil, methotrexate and cisplatin Etc. use in conjunction, find that Thallus Gracilariae can substantially increase the effect of Chemotherapeutic treatments multiple different tissue sources tumor.

China marine site is vast, if can be the anti-swollen of anti-tumor chemotherapeutic medicine synergist by the exploitation of resourceful Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide Tumor medicine or prevention and health care product, will reduce the cost of new drug development and exploitation.In view of Thallus Gracilariae is that one is readily available tool Having the marine algae resource of potential applicability in clinical practice, in order to make full use of this algae resource, those skilled in the art are devoted to Open up the purposes of its bioactive substance further.

The present invention is achieved by the following technical solutions:

First aspect, the invention provides a kind of Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide as anti-tumor chemotherapeutic medicine synergist at antineoplastic agent Application in thing preparation, such as pulmonary carcinoma, gastric cancer, cervical cancer and hepatocarcinoma etc..

Preferably, the active component in described antineoplastic chemotherapy medicine is paclitaxel, fluorouracil, first ammonia At least one in pterin and cisplatin.

Preferably, when described active component is paclitaxel, Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is 1 with the weight ratio of paclitaxel: (50～100).

Preferably, when described active component is fluorouracil, Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide and the weight ratio of fluorouracil For 1:(20～40).

Preferably, when described active component is methotrexate, Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is 1 with the weight ratio of methotrexate: (10～20).

Preferably, when described active component is cisplatin, Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is 1:(25～50 with the weight ratio of cisplatin).

Second aspect, the invention provides a kind of antitumor drug containing Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide, it is characterised in that include dragon Palpus dish polysaccharide synergist, anti-tumor active ingredient and pharmaceutically acceptable adjuvant.

Preferably, during described anti-tumor active ingredient is paclitaxel, fluorouracil, methotrexate and cisplatin extremely Few one, described adjuvant is mass spectrum level distilled water.

Preferably, the parts by weight of described anti-tumor active ingredient are 10～100 parts, described Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide Parts by weight are 1 part, and the parts by weight of described mass spectrum level distilled water are 50～2000 parts.

Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide in the present invention can use trichloroacetic acid method (Trichloroacetic acid, TAC method) from red algae dragon Dish must extract, then carry out stepwise elution with DEAE-Sephadex A-25 ion exchange column and purify, reclaim notable fraction The holosaccharide obtained.Being mainly composed of D-galactose and 3,6-inner ether galactose, wherein D-galactose content is 27.36%, 3,6-inner ether galactose content is 29.38%.Extracting method specifically can be found in: Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is to proliferation of lung cancer cells ability And the impact of form. aquatic product journal, 2015,39 (9): 1405-1411.

Compared with prior art, the present invention has a following beneficial effect:

Present invention firstly discovers that Sargassum Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide joins with chemotherapeutic paclitaxel, fluorouracil, methotrexate and cisplatin etc. Close and use the effect that can increase Chemotherapeutic treatments tumor.Research finds, Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is combined for multiple with chemotherapeutic The tumor cell of different tissue sources has suppression tumor proliferation and the effect of activity, including pulmonary carcinoma, gastric cancer and cervical cancer etc., Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is dose dependent to the potentiation of chemotherapeutic, and working concentration in Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide In vitro cell experiment Have no toxicity, have that medicine source is abundant, the feature of safety non-toxic, can be further developed as anti-tumor chemotherapeutic medicine synergist Antitumor drug or prevention and health care product, there is potential applicability in clinical practice.

Accompanying drawing explanation

By the detailed description non-limiting example made with reference to the following drawings of reading, the further feature of the present invention, Purpose and advantage will become more apparent upon:

Fig. 5 is the Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide Pharmacodynamics in vitro research figure to cisplatin potentiation of embodiments of the invention 5.

Detailed description of the invention

Below in conjunction with specific embodiment, the present invention is described in detail.Following example will assist in those skilled in the art Member is further appreciated by the present invention, but limits the present invention the most in any form.It should be pointed out that, the common skill to this area For art personnel, without departing from the inventive concept of the premise, it is also possible to make some deformation and improvement.These broadly fall into Protection scope of the present invention.

Embodiment 1

The Inhibit proliferaton effect to three kinds of tumor cells of the Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide

Experiment material: Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is the polysaccharide that extraction purification obtain from red algae plant Thallus Gracilariae.Dragon palpus Dish is 981 kinds, picks up from Wenzhou District of Zhejiang Province.Human lung carcinoma cell line A549, stomach cancer cell line MKN45 and cervix uteri JEG-3 Hela is purchased from Chinese Academy of Sciences's cell bank, and this room preserves cultivates.

Experimental technique: the Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide being dried by purification adds ddH2O is made into 1mg/mL mother solution, filtration sterilization, Subpackage ,-20 DEG C frozen standby.Human lung carcinoma cell line A549, stomach cancer cell line MKN45 and cervical cancer cell lines Hela is attached cell, respectively with 5 × 10 after cell recovery6The inoculum density kind of/L is in 1640 fresh cultivations Liquid (the RPMI1640 culture medium containing 89v/v%, the 1U/mL's of the hyclone FBS, 1v/v% of 10v/v% Green grass or young crops-streptomycin) in cultivate, be placed in 37 DEG C, saturated humidity, 5v/v%CO2Incubator is cultivated.Within every 2 days, change liquid, Pass on 1 time.Take the logarithm respectively A549, MKN45 and Hela cell of trophophase, disappear with 0.25v/v% pancreatin Change, count, with the RPMI-1640 culture fluid diluting cells containing 10v/v% hyclone, make 1 × 104/mL Cell suspension, is inoculated in 3 piece of 96 well culture plate, every hole 200 μ L, and making every porocyte density is 2 × 103 Individual, often group sets 4 parallel multiple holes, and sets the most celliferous blank group, cultivates 24h, after cell attachment, often Hole add containing variable concentrations Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide (0,20,50,100g/mL) 200L culture medium change liquid, wherein 0g/mL Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide group is matched group.After cultivating 48h the most continuously, add the cultivation containing 10v/v%CCK-8 Base 200L changes liquid, continues to cultivate 2.5h, uses each hole light absorption value of automatic elisa reading instrument detection wavelength 450nm A.Calculate growth of tumour cell suppression ratio by following equation, analyze the proliferation activity of drug on tumor cell to be measured Impact.

Result: from fig. 1, it can be seen that along with the increase of activity, Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is raw to three kinds of inhibiting tumour cells Long and value-added effect also increased, but within 20g/mL, acts on the most inconspicuous (P > 0.05).And as When being 50 by concentration, the growth of adenocarcinoma of stomach MKN45, pulmonary carcinoma A549 and s and multiplication capacity It is 59.16%, 51.29% and 69.96% (P < 0.05) respectively.When activity is 100g/mL, to A549, The multiplication capacity 46.27%, 43.77% and 50.67% (P < 0.01) of MKN45 and Hela cell.

Visible, each experimental group compared with matched group Inhibit proliferaton effect, Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide to the growth of tumor cell and Multiplication capacity has inhibitory action, and along with the increase of concentration, cell proliferation vigor is the least, and inhibitory action increases the brightest Aobvious.Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide presents obvious concentration dependent to the action effect of growth of tumour cell and Proliferation Ability.

Embodiment 5

The Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide pharmacodynamic study to cisplatin antitumor potentiation

In embodiment 1, it is used alone Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide and acts on gastric cancer MKN45, pulmonary carcinoma A549 and cervical cancer Hela cell all shows certain antitumor action.The present embodiment by Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide be used for treating multiple entity The one line medication cisplatin (Shandong pharmacy, specification: 20mg, traditional Chinese medicines quasi-word H37021358) of tumor is used in combination, and makees For MKN45, A549 and Hela cell.Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide medication and activity, tumor cell culture Method, ability of cell proliferation detection method, cell viability computing formula and data analysing method are with embodiment 2.Knot The most as shown in table 4 and fig. 5:

The above results shows, when being used alone chemotherapeutic drugs Cisplatin, 2g/mL cisplatin is to three kinds of growth of tumour cell and increasing Grow when all having certain inhibitory action and cisplatin and Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide are used in combination, its tumor killing effect be remarkably reinforced and More than being used alone the tumor killing effect (P < 0.01 or P < 0.05) of cisplatin, wherein to the tumor killing effect of pulmonary carcinoma the most Significantly (P < 0.01).Along with Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide consumption increases, potentiation strengthens, and presents dose dependent.This Illustrate that Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide adds the tumor killing effect of cisplatin, cisplatin is served the effect of a kind of synergist.

Embodiment 6

Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is used as the application in preparing antitumor drug of the cisplatin synergist

Experiment material: Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide and cis-platinum injections agent are with embodiment 5.Internal pharmacodynamic experiment object is Kunming kind H22 Male tumor-bearing mice (body weight 17-21g).

Experiment packet: after model copy second day, ascites tumor mice is randomly divided into 5 groups, is respectively as follows: 1. normal saline Group (negative control group)；2. cisplatin 10mg/kg group (positive controls)；3. cisplatin 10mg/kg+ Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide 25mg/kg (small dose group)；4. cisplatin 10mg/kg+ Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide 50mg/kg (middle dosage group)；5. cisplatin 10mg/kg+ dragon Must dish polysaccharide 100mg/kg (heavy dose of group).

Experimental technique: after being raised 3 days by H22 tumor-bearing mice adaptability, aseptic aspiration ascitic type H22 hepatocarcinoma passes on little Mouse ascites fluid, adjusting cell density with normal saline dilution is 5x106The cell suspension of/ml.Aseptic inoculation in mouse peritoneal, Every injection 0.2ml.After second day random packet, normal saline group gives 0.2ml normal saline by lumbar injection and notes Penetrating liquid, every 3 days 1 time, totally 3 times, gavage gives normal saline, 0.3ml/ pcs/day, drug withdrawal after continuous 9 days；Cisplatin 10mg/kg group presses 10mg/kg body weight, gives cisplatin injections by lumbar injection, every 3 days 1 time, totally 3 times, often It gavage gives Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide solution, 0.3ml/ pcs/day so that it is final concentration respectively reaches 25,50,100mg/kg, Continuous gastric infusion drug withdrawal after 9 days every day.After last is administered, record each group of dead mouse number of elements every day.During data statistics Between node be the 70th day, the mice still survived after 70 days is calculated by existence for 70 days.Analyze each group of H22 hepatocarcinoma Ascites tumor mice Average Survival natural law and increase in life span, the results are shown in Table 5.The vacation that each group survival day uses the time to compare If inspection (log-rank inspection).The computing formula analyzing each group of increase in life span is as follows:

Increase in life span=(T-C)/C X 100, wherein T is experimental administration group Average Survival natural law, and C is negative control Group Average Survival natural law.

Table 5 different disposal group H22 hepatic ascites tumor mice Average Survival natural law and increase in life span analysis

Note: * represents compared with normal saline group, P < 0.01；# represents compared with cisplatin 10mg/kg group, P < 0.05

Above-mentioned Average Survival natural law analysis result shows, compared with cisplatin 10mg/kg group, and cisplatin 10mg/kg+ dragon palpus Dish polysaccharide 50mg/kg and cisplatin 10mg/kg+ Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide 100mg/kg group H22 hepatic ascites tumor mice average Survival day significantly extends.Increase in life span analysis result shows, cisplatin 10mg/kg group H22 hepatic ascites tumor mice It is 64.72% relative to the increase in life span of normal saline group mice, cisplatin 10mg/kg+ Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide 100mg/kg Group reaches 97.48% relative to the increase in life span of normal saline group mice；Compared with simple cisplatin 10mg/kg group mice, Cisplatin 10mg/kg+ Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide 100mg/kg group H22 hepatic ascites tumor Bearing Mice Life Prolongation rate reaches 59.27%.Table Bright Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide 100mg/kg and cisplatin 10mg/kg use in conjunction relative to cisplatin 10mg/kg for H22 hepatocarcinoma abdomen Hydatoncus Bearing Mice Life rate has obvious prolongation effect, has significant difference and curative effect advantage, has clinical value.

Sargassum Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide is used in combination can increase with chemotherapeutic paclitaxel, fluorouracil, methotrexate and cisplatin etc. The effect of Chemotherapeutic treatments tumor.Its Synergistic mechanism is probably Thallus Gracilariae polysaccharide and inhibits some gene of tumor cell Repair, and reversed the tumor cell drug resistance for chemotherapeutic such as paclitaxel, fluorouracil, methotrexate and cisplatin.

section.content: 本发明提供种提神熏香，包括功香料、粘合剂和辅料，由下述重量份组成：栈香5～10份、檀香5～10份、沉香1～3份、厚朴4～8份、苏合香1～5份、藿香1～3份、洋甘菊1～3份、丁香4～8份、麻黄5～10份、青皮10～15份、乳香4～9份、香薷5～10份、柏树子4～9份、松球1～5份、冰片1～3份、榆树皮40～50份、面粉10～15份、木炭3～5份、蜂蜜5～10份、松香5～10份；其制备方法包括将香料、榆树皮和木炭粉碎，与加热融化后的松香、面粉和蜂蜜混合后制成香条或香片，经过干燥及包装后得到成品保存；本发明具有原料纯天然、无化学添加剂、制作简单、成本低的特点，制备的熏香能够提神醒脑、疏导人体正气、调整机体平衡。

The invention provides refreshing incense, which contains functional perfumes, adhesives and an accessory, and is prepared from the following raw materials in parts by weight: 5 to 10 parts of aquilaria sinensis, 5 to 10 parts of lignum santali albi, 1 to 3 parts of lignum aquilariae resinatum, 4 to 8 parts of cortex magnoliae officinalis, 1 to 5 parts of styrax, 1 to 3 parts of wrinkled giant hyssop, 1 to 3 parts of chamomile, 4 to 8 parts of flos caryophylli, 5 to 10 parts of herba ephedrae, 10 to 15 parts of pericarpium citri reticulatae viride, 4 to 9 parts of frankincense, 5 to 10 parts of herba moslae, 4 to 9 parts of cypress seed, 1 to 5 parts of pine cone, 1 to 3 parts of borneol, 40 to 50 parts of elm bark, 10 to 15 parts of wheat flour, 3 to 5 parts of charcoal, 5 to 10 parts of honey and 5 to 10 parts of rosin. The preparation method of the refreshing incense comprises the following steps of crushing the perfumes, the elm bark and the charcoal, mixing an obtained first mixture with the heated and molten rosin, the wheat flour and the honey, making an obtained second mixture into incense strips or incense pieces, drying and packing the incense strips or the incense pieces, then obtaining finished products, and storing the finished products. The refreshing incense and the preparation method thereof have the characteristics that the raw materials are pure natural; no chemical additives exist; the making is simple; the cost is low; the prepared incense can be used for refreshing oneself, sobering the brain, leading the vital qi of a human body and adjusting organism balance.

One is refreshed oneself incense and preparation method thereofTechnical field

The invention belongs to daily life technical field, be specifically related to one and refresh oneself incense and system thereof Preparation Method.

Background technology

Along with developing rapidly of society now, people's rhythm of life accelerates, and modern lives pressure The situation of the tired minds such as power is big, sleepy, tired annoyings people often.As work Make the reason of time length or poor sleeping quality, occur that routine work is absent minded, work The problems such as inefficient.Working as seasonal law, weather day by day turns warm, and people also can feel sleepy, tired Weary, dizzy sleepy, it is simply that spring sleepiness, it is because exchanging the physiological change brought season The objective reaction of one.These phenomenons are all that total balance of the body is broken by internal and external factor and produced Phenomenon.In order to solve these problems, everybody contemplates the method for various solution.Many is refreshed oneself The product of refreshment arises at the historic moment, and most common of which is through drinking drinks, alleviates Fatigue and refreshment.But this kind of beverage contains caffeine etc. mostly to stimulate cerebral neural sharp Element, quotes for a long time, and effect worse and worse, can even have influence on the health of health.Due to it In containing pungent, skin allergy or the untoward reaction such as uncomfortable can be caused, especially To elderly or weak child, the biggest health risk can be caused.

Incense is on being used at home health preserving from ancient times, cultivating one's taste, play beautify the environment, Soothe the spirit the happy heart, practice of meditating, offer a sacrifice to gods or ancestors for god, health preserving such as gets rid of illness at the aspect.Natural pure plant is smoked Perfume (or spice), has multiple benefit, can purify air quality human body, moulds and selects free of contamination existence sky Between, enhance metabolism, help to maintain respiratory tract function, make breathing smooth and easy, regulate physiology Function, stress of releiving, make people's soul happy, relaxed and joyful, the potential life of exciting human Life power, the treatment to some patients also has certain effect.But general refreshment Although incense allows people regain consciousness at short notice, but still easily produces essence when not using incense The phenomenon that god is dispirited, it is impossible to tackle the problem at its root.

Therefore, during tired mind frequent for modern, exploitation one is suitable for modern to be made Refreshment, simultaneously to human body without health risk, it is possible to fundamentally solve spirit tired Tired incense is a great problem that those skilled in the art are faced.

Summary of the invention

In order to overcome above-mentioned prior art defect, it is an object of the invention to provide one and refresh oneself Incense and preparation method thereof, combines the Chinese crude drug of refreshment with incense, at ancient prescription On the basis of combine Chinese medicine combination principle, select medicine, nurse one's health total balance of the body by incense, Dredge human righteousness, efficiently solve the problems referred to above.

In order to solve above-mentioned technical problem, the present invention takes following technical scheme:

inventionTitles.title: Coffee machine filter cup structure and coffee machine with coffee machine filter cup
咖啡机滤杯结构以及具有该咖啡机滤杯的咖啡机

address.address1: Taiwan County, Hsinchu city Chinese Chupei
Beijing Kelong international intellectual property agency limited liability company

event-title.$: INVENTION PATENT APPLICATION DEEMED WITHDRAWN AFTER PUBLICATION
ENTRY INTO FORCE OF REQUEST FOR SUBSTANTIVE EXAMINATION

section.content: The invention provides a coffee machine filter cup structure and a coffee machine with the coffee machine filter cup, wherein the coffee machine filter cup structure comprises: a filter bowl, a tube, and a connecting element. The filter cup is a cone-shaped cup body, which comprises: a cup mouth and a cup bottom; wherein, a water outlet end is arranged at the preset position of the cup bottom. This body is located a side of this filter bowl, and it is including: an inlet end, a first bending part, a second bending part and an outlet end. The two ends of the connecting element respectively connect the inlet end of the pipe body to the water outlet end of the filter bowl. The inlet end of the pipe body extends from the lower part of the bottom of the filter bowl to the direction of the cup opening through the first bend, and further extends to the outlet end from the direction of the bottom of the filter bowl after extending to the second bend, so that the horizontal position of the outlet end of the pipe body is lower than that of the water outlet end of the filter bowl.

本发明提供种咖啡机滤杯结构以及具有该咖啡机滤杯的咖啡机，该咖啡机滤杯结构包括有：滤杯、管体、以及衔接元件。该滤杯是圆锥状杯体，其包括有：杯口、以及杯底；其中，位于该杯底预设位置处设有出水端。该管体位于该滤杯的侧边，其包括有：入口端、第弯折处、第二弯折处、以及出口端。该衔接元件的两端分别将该管体的入口端连接于该滤杯的出水端。该管体的该入口端由该滤杯的杯底下方处经由该第弯折往该杯口方向进行延伸，并且延伸至该第二弯折处后再往该杯底方向进步延伸至该出口端，使该管体的出口端水平位置低于该滤杯的出水端水平位置。

Coffee machine bowl construction and there is the coffee machine of this coffee machine filter bowlTechnical field

The present invention relates to the bowl construction of a kind of coffee machine, espespecially coffee powder can be completely soaked in hot water by one In, make the filter of aromatic, the delicious coffee machine that brewed coffee presented closer to manual coffee Cup structure.

Background technology

Along with the rapid change of social environment, cause everyone and the competition of intercompany, life step quick Etc., at these pressures, people are often in the misgivings in leisure, and pursuing some can provide physical and mental relaxation, or Loosen activity and the living habit of mood, reduce the pressure day by day increased, also have many people the most too many Time is walked toward open air, so some more static and quick modes can be selected, and removes cafe or is in certainly Oneself infuses coffee, it is simply that a kind of easypro pressure liked by a lot of people and the mode of enjoyment, because coffee can carry Carry out a kind of the most leisurely life atmosphere, time also really can by caffeine make people obtain refresh oneself, quelling Effect, meanwhile, the coffee social beverage with the one of people's share especially, typically to like that the people of coffee comes See, it will usually buy coffee machine and modulate coffee, drink coffee it is first necessary to coffee bean to be chosen, then will be wanted Coffee bean grind according to the granular size oneself liked, then the coffee powder after grinding is poured among coffee machine, One cup of pure coffee of perfume (or spice) is enjoyed again through brewing of coffee machine.

Referring to shown in Fig. 1, Fig. 1 is the structural representation of existing American-style coffee machine, this existing caffe american A clear water 8 default in one aqua storage tank 92 is heated by machine 9 by a heating 91, then warp Clear water 8 (hot water) after being heated by 93, conduit delivers to the top of a screen holder 94 of flat taper, makes heat Water is dropped in screen holder 94, and is provided with a filter screen 95 (or deserted filter paper) in screen holder 94, this filter Net 95 then supply the coffee powder 7 of certain deal place, after hot water is dropped into this screen holder 94, this coffee Powder 7 can be immersed in this hot water 8, and is dissolved in by the related compounds in coffee powder 7 in this hot water 8 with shape Become a coffee liquid 6, finally oozed by the perforation 941 bottom screen holder 94 and fall in the middle of cup 96, just Become one cup of aromatic caffe american.

In existing American-style coffee machine 9 structure, owing to screen holder 94 is the form in flattened-conical shape, then add This perforation 941 upper is positioned at the cone part bottom screen holder 94, and the most granular coffee powder 7 can be deposited in Cone part bottom screen holder 94, this can allow what this hot water 8 circulate to slow, and reaches the effect of immersion Really.Owing to coffee powder 7 can stack the cone part being deposited on bottom screen holder 94, therefore coffee powder 7 with should The contact area of hot water 8 relatively can reduce, and this phenomenon can make the related compounds in coffee powder 7 be extracted The amount taken out is the fewest, and the coffee powder 7 being positioned at this filter screen 95 peripheral region cannot be completely soaked, and causes The waste of coffee powder 7 causes the main cause that caffe american is thin the most just.

Therefore, how to design and be suitable for overlapping for the numerous American-style coffee machines sold on the market, and heat is provided Water and coffee powder have the sufficient time to soak so that the coffee brewed out is the most aromatic strong, more connects The mouthfeel of nearly manual brewed coffee, becomes the major subjects into the present invention.In view of this present inventor, is Adhere to and be engaged in this research and development many years of experience, through constantly research, experiment, pray making to allow the coffee sold on the market Coffee after machine brews is more closely similar to the manual effect brewed, and make its coffee mouthfeel brewed the most aromatic, Delicious.

section.content: 本发明提供包含苯磺酸贝托斯汀的新组合物，所述组合物为例如不含山梨醇的组合物、含有至少约0.008％w/v苯扎氯铵的组合物以及含有羟丙基甲基纤维素E15LV的组合物。

The present invention provides the new compositions comprising benzenesulfonic acid 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy, and described compositions is the such as compositions without sorbitol, the compositions containing at least about 0.008%w/v benzalkonium chloride and the compositions containing HPMC E15 LV.

4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy compositionsThis application claims the co-pending U.S. provisional application Ser.No 61/390,262 submitted on October 6th, 2010 Priority, above-mentioned patent is incorporated herein by reference with entire contents.

Background technology

4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy, i.e. (+)-(S)-4-[4-[(4-chlorophenyl) (2-pyridine radicals) methoxyl group] piperidino] butanoic acid, Non-sedating, high selective antagonist for histamine H1-receptor.4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy has Stabilization for mastocyte, and can press down Oxyphil cell processed is to the migration of Inflamed tissue.It has three kinds of mechanism of action: mast cell stabilizers, histamine antagonist and addicted to Acidic cell regulator/inhibitor.4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy and pharmacologically acceptable salt have antihistamine effect and anti-allergic effects. They be also characterized by that can to reduce second order effect (such as common for central nervous system's in conventional antihistamines agent Stimulate or suppression), and they can be as effective agent (PCT Patent Application WO98/ for the treatment of human and animal 29409)。

In Japan, benzenesulfonic acid 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy went through from 2000 whole body use for treating allergic rhinitis, and from Within 2002, rise and be approved for treating urticaria/pruritus.In Japan, it is by Mitsubishi Tanabe Pharma Corporation (former name Tanabe Seiyaku Co., Ltd.) withBrand name sell.Benzenesulfonic acid shellfish The medicinal eye drop of ISTA of torr STING, i.e.(benzenesulfonic acid 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy eye drop) 1.5%w/v, through U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) itches for treating the eye relevant with anaphylaxis conjunctivitis in JIUYUE, 2009 approval.

Accompanying drawing explanation

Fig. 1 shows a clinical effectiveness.

Fig. 2 shows another clinical effectiveness.

Fig. 3 shows another clinical effectiveness.

Summary of the invention

There is provided herein the compositions comprising 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy and officinal salt thereof.In an aspect, it is provided that without mountain Pears alcohol or the compositions of the 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy (such as benzenesulfonic acid 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy) that is substantially free of sorbitol.In another aspect, Provide and comprise 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy (such as benzenesulfonic acid 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy) and hydroxypropyl methyl cellulose (HPMC, hypromellose (USAN), such as HPMC E15 LV) compositions.In another aspect, it is provided that comprise 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy (example Such as benzenesulfonic acid 4-[(S)-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-pyridinylmethoxy) and the combination of preservative (benzalkonium chloride of such as benzalkonium chloride, the most about 0.008%w/v) Thing.

Background of invention

Kv3 voltage-gated potassium channels family includes 4 members Kv3.1, Kv3.2, Kv3.3 and Kv3.4.These hypotypes are each From gene can generate multiple isoform by alternative splicing, thus produce the version with different C-terminal domains.So far In mammal, identified 13 kinds of isoforms till the present, but the electric current expressed by these variants obviously similar (Rudy and McBain,2001,Trends in Neurosciences24,517-526).Kv3 passage by make plasma membrane depolarization to than- The voltage of 20mV more positivity and be activated；Additionally, passage rapid deactivation after the repolarization of film.These biophysical properties are true The peak value having protected the passage neuron action potential depolarizing phase to starting repolarization is open.The mediation of Quick stop Kv3 passage Action potential makes neuron recover more quickly to reach from it can trigger the subthreshold value transmembrane potential of other action potential.Make For result, the existence in some neuron of the Kv3 passage facilitate ability that they discharge in high frequency (Rudy and McBain, 2001,Trends in Neurosci.24,517-526).Kv3.1-3 hypotype is preponderated in CNS, and Kv3.4 passage is main See (Weiser et al., 1994, J.Neurosci.14,949-972) in skeletal muscle and sympathetic neuron.Kv3.1-3 passage is sub- Type by the cortex of brain and hippocampus (such as Chow et al., 1999, J.Neurosci.19,9332-9345；Martina etc. People, 1998, J.Neurosci.18,8111-8125；McDonald and Mascagni, 2006, Neurosci.138,537-547, Chang et al., 2007, J.Comp.Neurol.502,953-972), thalamus (such as Kasten et al., 2007, J.Physiol.584,565-582), cerebellum (such as Sacco et al., 2006, Mol.Cell.Neurosci.33,170-179) With auditory brainstem core (auditory brain stem nuclei) (Li et al., 2001, J.Comp.Neurol.437,196- 218) the relay cell subclass in is differentially expressed.

The sign of the mice that one or more of which Kv3 hypotype has been deleted shows, there is not Kv3.1 and causes spontaneous work Dynamic (locomotor activity) increases, brain cardon activity change and sleep pattern fragmentation (Joho et al., 1999, J.Neurophysiol.82,1855-1864).The deletion of Kv3.2 causes Seizure Threshold to reduce and cortex brain cardon is movable Change (Lau et al., 2000, J.Neurosci.20,9071-9085).The deletion of Kv3.3 lacks with mild ataxia and motion Fall into relevant (McMahon et al., 2004, Eur.J.Neurosci.19,3317-3327).Additionally, the function of Kv3.3 passage in people Sudden change minimizing be associated with spinocebellar ataxia 13 type (Waters et al., 2006, Nat.Genet.38, 447-451).The dual deletion of Kv3.1 and Kv3.3 cause with spontaneous epileptic seizures,

Ataxia and the sensitivity to ethanol effect increase to feature serious phenotype (Espinosa et al., 2001, J.Neurosci.21,6657-6665；Espinosa et al., 2008, J.Neurosci.28,5570-5581).

The known pharmacology of Kv3 passage is limited.It turned out etamon (TEA) under low millimolar concentration, suppress passage (Rudy and McBain, 2001, Trends in Neurosci.24,517-526), and it turned out from sea anemone ditch windward Sea anemone (Anemonia sulcata) suppression blood material (BDS) toxin (Diochot et al., 1998, J.Biol.Chem.273,6744 6749) optionally with high-affinity suppression Kv3 passage (Yeung et al., 2005, J.Neurosci.25,8735–8745).In addition to directly acting on the compound of Kv3 passage, it has already been proven that activated protein kinase A (PKA) and the receptor stimulating agent of Protein kinase C (PKC) also regulates the electric current of Kv3-mediation in specific brain regions region, thus cause god The ability discharged in high frequency through unit decline (Atzori et al., 2000, Nat.Neurosci.3,791-798；Song et al., 2005,Nat Neurosci.8,1335-1342)；These study prompting, PKA and PKC can be special in neuronal specificity mode Property ground phosphorylation Kv3 passage, thus cause the electric current reduction that Kv3-mediate.

Medicine.Embodiment 4 (3,10 or 30mg/kg) or vehicle (Captisol20%+ Tween 80 0.1% is used with 10mL/kg i.p. Aseptic aqueous solution with HPMC0.5%).Immediately animal is put into after giving clozapine and embodiment 4 test site (30 minutes, Then amfetamine is used).

The blood level analysis of embodiment 4

At the end of behavior determination, (testing drug is administered latter 90 minutes) gathers blood from Study Mouse subgroup (n=3) Sample, uses and has the HPLC-MS/MS of method for optimization analysis based on the method carrying out protein precipitation with acetonitrile, then use It is measured.Owing to the stability of the analyte in blood and brain is unknown, so being administered preparation calibration on same day standard substance And quality control sample (QC) and it is stored together with study sample (CS).Grind as internal standard (IS) enhanced sensitivity with rolipram Study carefully sample, CS, QC and blank.Analyze and research together with CS, QC and blank sample sample with discrete batch.

Result

Being used alone amfetamine causes total spontaneous activity to have big, the increase of significance.10mg/kg i.p. dosage Embodiment 4 significantly reduces the increase of total spontaneous activity that amfetamine is caused.The more high dose of 30mg/kg i.p. Embodiment 4 further reduces the spontaneous of amfetamine induction in the way of similar with positive control clozapine (3mg/kg i.p.) Movable increase.By Data Summary in Table 1.

Table 1: the embodiment 4 hyperkinetic effect to the mice that amfetamine induces.Amfetamine (2mg/kg i.p.) it Within first 30 minutes, i.p. uses embodiment 4.Before amfetamine (2mg/kg i.p.), 30 minutes i.p. use clozapine.At phenylpropyl alcohol Amine immediately begins to after using go through 60 minutes evaluates spontaneous activity.Tables of data is shown as meansigma methods ± sem.Data are carried out Dan Yin Element variance analysis (ANOVA), (* * * p < 0.001, * p < 0.05, with single amphetamine treatment phase then to carry out Dunnett inspection Than).After using testing drug 90 minutes, at the end of experiment, determine the haemoconcentration of subgroup from 3 mices.Shown in Data be Mean blood levels and scope.(n.d.=undetermined).

Conclusion

These results show, embodiment 4 can prevent the hyperkinesia that psychostimulant amfetamine induces.Therefore, as permissible From the algoscopy described in Biological examples 1 viewed, embodiment 4 and just regulating Kv3.1 and/or Kv3.2 It is relevant to hyperkinesia that other compound (in the case of not affecting channel gating kinetics) of passage can be used for treatment Obstacle, such as bipolar mania (bipolar mania) or dopamine system destroy, it can occur in drug dependence, attention In defect hyperkinetic syndrome (ADHD) or schizophrenia.

Further illustrating of the potential utility of the compound of the present invention such as provides in WO2012/076877, and it will The use of Kv3.1 and/or Kv3.2 channel modulators associates with many obstacles.

section.content: Present invention relates in general to field of nutrition, particularly physical efficiency nutrition.Specifically, the present invention relates to comprise the new carbohydrate gels of glucose that ratio is 3: 1 to 1: 1 and fructose.The carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be used for treating or prevent GI problem, can strengthen the oxidation that blood sugar maintains and/or increases ectogenic carbohydrate simultaneously.
本发明总体上涉及营养领域，特别是体能营养。具体而言，本发明涉及包含比率为3∶1到1∶1的葡萄糖和果糖的新的碳水化合物凝胶。本发明的碳水化合物凝胶可用于治疗或预防胃肠道的问题、同时可以增强血糖维持和/或增加外源性的碳水化合物的氧化。

Carbohydrate gelsGenerally, the present invention relates to field of nutrition, particularly physical efficiency field of nutrition.Specifically, the present invention relates to new carbohydrate gels.

Fully confirm that the picked-up of carbohydrate at the volley is possible not only to improve the endurance that long-time (＞ 2 hours) moves, it is also possible to improve short time motion endurance (Coyle EF, J Sports Sci 22:39-55,2004；Gisolfi CV.Med Sci Sports Exerc 24:679-687,1992, Jeukendrup AE and Jentjens R.Sports Med 29:407-424,2000).

Endurance exercise, especially adjoint stomach and intestine (GI) disorder of running can finally affect behavior expression and (see: Brouns F. et al. Int J Sports Med 8:175-189,1987, Gisolfi CV.NewsPhysiol Sci 15:114-119,2000, Peters HP. et al. Gut 48:435-439,2001).It is true that 30% to 50% appearance being reported in endurance athletes and related bad GI symptom of moving.

Being likely to occur multiple symptom in motion process, this is attributable to top (esophagus and stomach) or the gastrointestinal disturbance of bottom (small intestine and colon).The GI symptom on top includes backflowing, feels sick, gasteremphraxis and upper abdomen cramp.The GI symptom of bottom includes that lower abdomen cramp, defecation of being eager, the increase of enterocinesia frequency, aerogastria and belly rush down.Have proven to the picked-up of liquid, the especially picked-up of carbohydrate can make many described severity of symptoms, its gastric emptying serious GI can be caused disorderly of slowing down.

Consistent with these the negative GI problems relating to Hi CHO picked-up, and in view of previous studies result confirms that the carbohydrate of single source is the fastest only with oxidized (the Jeukendrup AE and Jentjens R. of 1 gram/minute or 60 Grams Per Hours, Sports Med 29:407-424, 2000.), ACSM (ACSM) carbohydrate intake in the motion of up-to-date recommendation in 2000 is 30-60 gram of CHO/ hour (ACSM, U.S. diet NI and Canada nutritionist MedSci Sports Exerc 32:2130-2145, 2000).

At present, a series of researchs it turned out compared with single carbohydrate source, the combination in the multiple kinds of carbohydrate source of the form of sports drink can produce higher total carbohydrates at the volley and deliver, this causes the efficiency of application efficiency and exogenous carbohydrate oxidation to improve 30% to 50% (Jentjens RL and Jeukendrup AE, Br J Nutr 93:485-492,2005；JeukendrupAE., Nutrition 20:669-677,2004；Jeukendrup AE and Jentjens R., SportsMed 29:407-424,2000；Jeukendrup AE, et al.., J Appl Physiol, 2005).With consume compared with isocaloric single glucose, when being remarkably improved its endurance (Currell K and Jeukendrup AE.Med Sci Sports Exerc 40:275-281,2008) after the combination that individuality consumes glucose and fructose.The individual test that can complete 1 hour after the motion by bike through two hours moderate strengths in this study, compared with solely consumption of glucose, after consuming the combination of glucose and fructose, achievement improves 8%.

But only when consuming the carbohydrate of substantial amounts of sports drink form just it is observed that these effects.It is necessary for consuming substantial amounts of liquid to absorb the desired amount of carbohydrate.

The discovery in the laboratory of these comparisons is contrary with the contest of reality, and when reality contest owing to worrying that GI is disorderly, sportsman tends to drink less amount of liquid and only absorbs a small amount of carbohydrate.Up to the present, also not with regard to the research report of multiple kinds of carbohydrate source tolerance in real-life situations.

Additionally, absorb substantial amounts of liquid in motion process and carbohydrate can cause infiltrative increase, this makes stomach (belly) emptying reduce, thus reduces liquid delivery.It in motion process, is not intended to occur the reduction of gastric emptying, because this can cause uncomfortable sensation that aerogastria and too many liquid rock in stomach.

Additionally, it is known that sportsman consume fructose can cause extremely painful GI problem (LedochowskiM, et al., Scand J Gastroenterol 36:367-371,2001；Mitsui T, et al., JSports Med Phys Fitness 41:121-123,2001.).In brief, the prevalence rate that GI is disorderly in endurance athletes is high, and this seems related to the picked-up of CHO in motion process, especially solely consumes fructose.Thus, find and consider gastrointestinal problems produced by sportsman according to these, do not recommend to consume fructose.

Based on prior art, it is an object of the invention to provide formulation product, described formulation product can provide carbohydrate very effectively to sportsman at the volley and improve the speed of exogenous carbohydrate oxidation, makes the risk minimization that gastrointestinal problems occurs simultaneously.

Inventor has surprisingly observed that and can realize this purpose according to the carbohydrate gels described in claim 1 and according to the application described in claim 12.

Although the purport of the present invention is primarily to sportsman, but can be it is clear that need anyone that carbohydrate supplies all can use the carbohydrate gels of the present invention.For example, the people being unwilling to carry very heavy food very likely uses the carbohydrate gels of the present invention as Portable food, such as in extended trip.Need to provide the people of carbohydrate can use the carbohydrate gels of the present invention equally to health, such as before the examination in school or university or in the test period.

The inventors have studied in the actual environment run out of doors or cycle, with the gastric tolerability of higher rate-delivery glucose and the carbohydrate gels of fructose mixture.

Have been found that: if picked-up as the form of gel comprise glucose that ratio is 3: 1 to 1: 1, preferably 2: 1 and fructose carbohydrate mixture when, absorb 90 grams of carbohydrate of the form of carbohydrate gels even per hour and 30-60 gram of CHO/ hour that ACSM recommends be well-tolerated for intestines and stomach.Gel also can comprise wherein Glucose-Fructose ratio and be 3: the carbohydrate mixture of 1-2.3: 1 and/or 1.7: 1 to 1: 1.

Being surprisingly found that absorbing above-mentioned carbohydrate mixture with 90 Grams Per Hours can make the GI uncomfortable holding of sportsman minimum, and shared ratio about individuality～15%.It moreover has been found that with absorb 60 grams per hour to comprise ratio to be compared with 3: 1 to 1: 1, the glucose of preferably 2: 1 and the carbohydrate mixture of fructose, minimum GI is uncomfortable not to be increased.

Thus, one embodiment of the invention is the carbohydrate gels comprising carbohydrate portions, and described carbohydrate portions comprises glucose and the fructose that ratio is 3: 1 to 1: 1.

Carbohydrate gels is the food of gel form, and it comprises at least one carbohydrate source, and preferably comprises the combination in multiple kinds of carbohydrate source, such as glucose and fructose or the combination of maltose and fructose.

The shape of carbohydrate gels is unimportant.

For the object of the invention, it is the gel products at environment temperature (in the range of i.e. at about 10 to 40 DEG C) substantially solid.Gel products is characterized by the quality of relatively soft Chewy.Common gel products includes based on the product of gelatin and based on certain form of product in carrageenan, alginates, starch, agarose, beta glucan, gellan gum, pectin or cellulosic cpd.Usual gel can be described in which that dispersion phase is combined the colloid generating semi-solid material, such as jelly with decentralized medium." (reacting related loss modulus with liquid-like in material) system just presents gel sample to be higher than G when given frequency once G ' (storage modulus related to material solid part).

Gel is also based on comprising the gel-type vehicle of the cell wall substance sheared from ripe and soft fruit.Think that fruit produces suddenly after ripening at ethene (a kind of important plant hormone related to maturation).Generally can easily ripening fruits be distinguished by the appearance of color, texture and the change of taste and immature fruit.For example, increase at least 20% compared with the sugar level before producing suddenly with ethene such as the sugar content of fruits in a preferred embodiment of the present invention and think this fruit maturation.If by the hardness of pressure measxurement fruit less than 15N/g, preferably shorter than 10N/g, most preferably from about 2-6N/g, thinking that this fruit is soft.The corresponding gel based on fruit cell wall material is disclosed in the common pending application EP 07109854.5 of applicant, is incorporated herein by reference entire contents.

In current sports industry, wish to give during endurance exercie that sportsman is a kind of fresh and the sensation of moisturizing (hydration), the uncomfortable sensation in stomach (having too many liquid sloshing in stomach) can be caused yet with drinking water during this period, so that the acquisition of this sensation becomes a problem.Avoid the uncomfortable sensation in stomach it is achieved thereby that this target while the carbohydrate gels of the present invention is by providing moisturizing.

It is owing to it is easy to carry about with one, is easy to consume (due to its moisture) and easy-to-swallow that sportsman generally also enjoys a lot gel, though also such during taking exercise.

Described multiple kinds of carbohydrate source comprises glucose and the fructose of digestible form.Glucose and/or fructose can provide with the form generating the carbohydrate of fructose (fructogenic) and/or glucose (glucogenic).The carbohydrate meaning generating fructose is the carbohydrate that complete hydrolysis discharges at least one fructose molecule in theory.The glucogenic carbohydrate meaning is the carbohydrate that complete hydrolysis discharges at least one glucose molecule in theory.Thus, carbohydrate can be glucogenic simultaneously and generate fructose (such as sucrose).

Therefore, carbohydrate can comprise as the monose of basic carbohydrate unit or consisting of such as glucose or fructose.Monose can represent a part of disaccharides, such as sucrose, lactose, maltose or cellobiose.Monose such as glucose or fructose also can represent a part of oligosaccharides or polysaccharide.In the present invention, preferred carbohydrate source is maltodextrin and/or dextrose.

Carbohydrate source can also comprise heavy carbohydrate, especially fiber.

The carbohydrate portions of described gel can comprise glucose and the fructose of the glucose of at least 30% and the glucose of fructose, preferably at least 50% and fructose, more preferably at least 85%.In one embodiment of the invention, the carbohydrate portions of described gel provides at least 50%, preferably at least the 70% of the energy of gel.

The carbohydrate gels of the present invention comprises carbohydrate portions and optionally comprises protein portion and/or fats portion.

The existence of protein and/or fat in the carbohydrate gels of the present invention has the advantage that and during movement can be supplied to the more sophisticated nutrition of sportsman.And, the existence of protein can make carbohydrate gels have the taste of improvement.

As protein source, any properly suitable dietary protein, such as animal protein (such as milk proem, meat albumen and Chicken Albumin) can be used；Vegetable egg white matter (such as soybean protein, wheat gluten, rice protein and pea protein)；The mixture of free amino acid；Or a combination thereof.Particularly preferred milk proem, such as casein and whey, and soybean protein.

Protein can be complete or hydrolysis, or complete and aminosal mixture.The protein (degree of hydrolysis is between 2% to 20%) being to provide partial hydrolysis that may want to, for example, has the sportsman of risk producing Milk allergy to be such for thinking.In addition, the protein that health is usually easier and metabolism quickly at least partly hydrolyzes.Especially such for amino acid.Thus, if the carbohydrate gels of the present invention comprises single amino acid, more preferably, most preferably comprise essential amino acid.The carbohydrate gels of the present invention comprises amino acid in one embodiment, such as L-Leu, Valine and/or ILE.

If comprising fat source in composition, then described fat source has the advantage that for example can realize improving taste.Any fat source is all suitable.For example can use animal or plant fat.In order to improve nutritive value, fat source can comprise n3-unrighted acid and n6-unrighted acid.Fat source also can contain LCFA and/or medium chain fatty acid.For example, butter oil, Canola oil, corn oil and/or high oleic sunflower oil can be used.

Every 100 grams of described gels preferably comprise the protein less than 30 grams and/or the fat less than 1 gram.

According to the recommendation of government organs such as USRDA, described carbohydrate gels can be possibly together with mineral matter and trace nutrient, such as trace element and vitamin.

The carbohydrate gels of the present invention can comprise vitamin, such as vitamin C, vitamin E, Cobastab12, nicotinic acid, Cobastab6, folic acid, biotin, pantothenic acid, Cobastab2And/or Cobastab6, the amount of preferably described vitamin is corresponding at least the 10% of recommended.

The existence of vitamin can promote the effect of gel performance and can Protection of the sportsman further.For example, ascorbic existence may consequently contribute to prevent common cold.

Described gel also can comprise electrolyte and/or mineral matter, such as sodium, potassium, calcium, iron, magnesium or zinc.

These compounds can helpful for the taste of gel, can help to supplement health at the volley due to the compound of constantly release of perspiring.They can also contribute to prevent the generation of sport myalgia.

Additionally, the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can also comprise selected from one or more following compounds: fragranced compound, fiber, caffeine, preservative, guarana (guarana), acidulant, adhesive, gel build material, water, fruit juice, fruit, antioxidant, colouring agent.

These materials can improve many characteristics of being permitted of the carbohydrate gels of the present invention, a lot of aspects known to stability during such as taste, denseness, color and storage, digestibility and those skilled in the art.

The energy density of described gel is not critical for its effect.But, the advantage of high-energy-density is need to absorb less food to supplement the carbohydrate as the health energy.Thus, the gel of the preferred high-energy-density of the present invention.

One embodiment of the invention is characterised by that the energy density of carbohydrate gels is 650-1500 kilojoule/100 gram, preferred 800-1300 kilojoule/100 gram, most preferably 850-1100 kilojoule/100 gram.

For the ease of consuming, such as in play or in match gap, the gel of a present invention is preferably relatively small specification.The preferably a specification of carbohydrate gels is 10-100 gram, preferred 15-75 gram, most preferably 20-50 gram.

Or, the gel of the present invention also can provide as a bite specification gel bits of a specification with 3 to 15 grams, preferably 5 to 10 grams or gel drops.Thus can be according to the athletic intake needing accurately to adjust carbohydrate.

Generally, the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can comprise the liquid of the amount of 20-60g/100g gel, particularly water.It is equally possible containing more substantial water.Such advantage is that the gel that obtains can be wetter and be therefore easier to swallow.But, simultaneously, it has to consume more gel so that carbohydrate is absorbed a certain amount of calorie.Similarly every 100g gel is likely to comprise lesser amount of water equally.The low-down gel of water content can be more difficult to swallow, but need to eat up less gel for being absorbed a certain amount of calorie by carbohydrate simultaneously.

The inventor have discovered that the water content of 20-60g/100g gel can very well take into account these two aspects.

Following daily intake (DV) percentage can be comprised based on the typical carbohydrate gels of the present invention of 2000 card meals: total fat of 0 to 1%, the sodium of 5% to 9%, the potassium of 0.5% to 1.5%, the carbohydrate of 12% to 16%, its glucose including 5% to 10% and fructose, and 10% to 14% protein.

Additionally, carbohydrate gels can comprise the vitamin C of 80 to 120%DV, the calcium of 20 to 30%DV, the iron of 25 to 35%DV, the vitamin E of 80 to 120%DV, the thiamine of 80 to 120%DV, the riboflavin of 80 to 120%DV, the nicotinic acid of 80 to 120%DV, the Cobastab of 80 to 120%DV6, the folate of 80 to 120%DV, the Cobastab of 80 to 120%DV12, the biotin of 80 to 120%DV, the pantothenic acid of 80 to 120%DV, the phosphorus of 20 to 30%DV, the magnesium of 20 to 30%DV, the zinc of 25 to 35%DV, the chromium of the copper of 25 to 35%DV and 15 to 25%DV.

The carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be used as such as food, food additive or dietetic product.

In a preferred embodiment of the invention, the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be used for preparation and strengthens the food of behavior expression, especially endurance or the food being used as enhancing behavior expression, especially endurance.

The formulation product of the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be additionally used in delivery carbohydrate and do not increases any gastrointestinal disorders and/or for treating or preventing gastrointestinal problems.

The combination of glucose and fructose in the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can make health tolerate the carbohydrate of high-load in the gel of the present invention well, therefore, avoid at least in part being generally expected to during movement absorb high-caliber carbohydrate after the gastrointestinal problems that can produce.And, will increase to the gastrointestinal tolerance of carbohydrate, the gastrointestinal tolerance especially to the mixture of the glucose/fructose of the present invention.

Gastrointestinal problems mentioned above is not particularly limited, but is preferably selected from: upper abdomen problem, such as backflow, heartburn, aerogastria, upper abdomen cramp, vomiting, feel sick；Lower abdomen problem, such as intestines cramp, flatulence, defecation of being eager, left belly pain, right belly pain, loose stool, belly rush down；Or the problem of general, such as dizziness, headache, muscle cramp or be eager to urinate.

For common motion, especially contest campaign it is important that health is provided that the blood sugar consuming for muscle always.Especially last compete, it is necessary to avoiding not having blood sugar supply muscle, otherwise sportsman will exhaust energy.The purport of the present invention is precisely in order to prevent the generation that this kind of thing.According to one embodiment of the invention, the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be used for strengthening motion later stage blood sugar and maintains.

The carbohydrate gels of the present invention can not only ensure that long-acting blood sugar maintains, it may also be used for strengthens the oxidation of exogenous carbohydrate.If the picked-up of people's carbohydrate is more than 1 gram/minute, preferably greater than 1.1 gram/minute, is more highly preferred to more than 1.2 gram/minute, then discovery has been improved particularly the oxidation of exogenous carbohydrate.

Thus, surprisingly when the picked-up of carbohydrate is higher than carbohydrate oxidation Threshold (the Jeukendrup AE and Jentjens R. having previously been thought that, Sports Med 29:407-424,2000) when, exogenous carbohydrate oxidation can reach most preferably.

So, the energy maximization being delivered by carbohydrate can be made during physical training.

Deliver additionally, the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be used for accelerating energy, especially to work intramuscular delivery energy, and/or provide more longlasting energy to muscle.The effect of these two aspects can facilitate athletic optimal performance.

Finally, the carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be additionally used in treatment or prevention fatigue symptom and/or improves cycle rhythm, such as with the cycle rhythm measured by revolution per minute, and/or reduce the rank (RPE) of self-induction fatigue degree.

The inventors discovered that any amount of picked-up comprise glucose that ratio is 3: 1 to 1: 1 and the carbohydrate of fructose all can successfully realize above-mentioned purposes.

But, when the amount of carbohydrate gels using be equivalent to absorb at least 30 grams of CHO/ little when, preferably at least 50 grams CHO/ hours, more preferably at least 65 grams CHO/ hours and most preferably 80 grams CHO/ hours little constantly to 110 grams of CHO/, it is thus achieved that best result.

The inventor have discovered that the amount of the carbohydrate absorbing per hour is higher, the oxidation of exogenous carbohydrate is increased by more.During when the gel consuming the present invention so that the carbohydrate consuming is 100 gram of-150 Grams Per Hour, preferably 110 gram-130 Grams Per Hour and optimum 115 grams of-125 Grams Per Hours, show that exogenous carbohydrate oxidation can reach maximum.

Those skilled in the art understands that they can freely combine all disclosed features of the present invention without departing from disclosed theme.

The present invention further feature and advantage are clearly visible in below example and accompanying drawing.

The result of study of Fig. 1-3 display embodiment 2.

Fig. 4 shows the result of study of embodiment 4.

Fig. 5 shows the result of study of embodiment 5.

Embodiment 1: prepared by gel

The carbohydrate gels of the present invention can be prepared by any of method in this area.

For example, gel can be prepared by the method comprising three below step.Step one includes the mixing of each composition and adds all of composition to mess kit.The main purpose of this step is to obtain smooth and homogeneous material, and this purpose part can make all the components suitably dissolve by good stirring and complete.Step 2 includes that described material is heated to 75 DEG C reaches at least 10 minutes.The main purpose of step 2 (heating process) is control microorganism and reduces product viscosity in order to filling process.Step 3 is filling process, by gel hot filling to bag, subsequently by bag heat-seal.

Typical gel preparation can comprise:

Carbohydrate mixture (maltodextrin, fructose and/or glucose), the water filtering, electrolyte mixture (sodium chloride, sodium citrate, potassium chloride), citric acid, natural perfume material, Sodium Benzoate, potassium sorbate, L-Leu (170mg/100g), Valine (170mg/100g), ILE (170mg/100g), vitamin A and vitamin C.

Embodiment 2:

Inventor have studied the GI tolerance of the CHO gel (ratio with 2: 1 delivers glucose and fructose mixture) in acutely run period median dose and high dose.

In randomized crossover design, the sportsman of the male sex of 26 endurance trainings and 8 women racers and participation nordic event (37 ± 11 years old；73±9kg；1.76 ± 0.07m) it is done as quickly as possible in the race based on place of 16km in both cases.Once they consume gel, provide CHO with the Mean Speed of 1.0g/ minute (medium), and another CHO provides with the Mean Speed of 1.4g/ minute (high), and wherein often 3.2km arbitrarily absorbs water.

Each runner completes to include 17 exercise " Invest, Then Investigate " questionnaires putd question to, and to evaluate, GI is comfortable and tolerance, and from " completely no problem " to " situation of the worst living through " scoring is 1 to 10 respectively.Result shows in fig. 1-3.

For two kinds are disposed, the questionnaire of GI problem puts question to scoring to be mostly located in the low subregion (" completely no problem ", " very small problem ") of scoring.Average scope is that 1.00 ± 0.00 (diarrhoea) are to 2.12 ± 1.90 (upper abdomen cramps).Described 17 enquirements with regard to symptom are divided into upper abdomen, lower abdomen and systemic problems.Wilcoxon signed rank sum test shows for upper abdomen problem (effect assessment, 0.16, se=0.08, p=0.26), for lower abdomen problem (effect assessment, 0.09, se=0.08, p=0.24) with for whole body problem (effect assessment,-0.02, se=0.14, p=0.54) significantly do not dispose difference (high-medium).

The average time run first of each participant is 1: 12: 08, and the average time that second time is run is 1: 12: 58.

The average time of the runner of 3 parts of gels of picked-up is 1: 13: 05, and when participant absorbs 4 parts of gels, the time is 1: 13: 06.

Contrasting first time and the second time test of each runner, 21 people run faster in second time, and 13 people run faster for the first time.19 runners when absorbing 4 parts of gels faster, and 15 when absorbing 3 parts of gels faster.

Show not too big difference average time between each disposal in a word.Show that the overall tolerability of the gel of described specified rate is good.

Although the CHO (glucose+fructose) of a large amount picked-up gel form, but the score of GI problem is averagely at low subregion, has relatively good tolerance to high CHO intake during being shown in the race of 16km.

Embodiment 3

Inventor's comparative studies only has the impact on GI tolerance for the gel of the gel of glucose and glucose+fructose when height picked-up speed.

In double blinding, random, cross-over design, the male sex of 34 endurance trainings and 14 women racers and triathlete (35 ± 10 years old；70±9kg；1.75 ± 0.09m) the fast as far as possible in both cases race based on place completing 16km twice.They accept to provide the gel (GLU/FRC) of the glucose gel (GLU) of CHO or glucose+fructose with 1.4g/ minute speed, and wherein every 3.2km arbitrarily absorbs water.Each runner completes to include 17 exercise " Invest, Then Investigate " questionnaires putd question to, and to evaluate, GI is comfortable and tolerance, and scoring is 1 to 10 (from " completely no problem " to " situation of the worst living through ").

47 runners complete according to scheme and run twice.One runner runs owing to intestines and stomach (gi) problem can not complete second time.She has to stop after 8 miles, but also includes her in stomach and intestine result part.

It for two kinds of disposal groups, is predominantly located at the low subregion (" completely no problem ", " very small problem ") of scoring with regard to the enquirement score of symptom.Average reaches 1.00 ± 0.0 (diarrhoea and loose stools) to 2.27 ± 1.78 (upper abdomen cramps).Described 17 enquirements with regard to symptom are divided into upper abdomen, lower abdomen and systemic problems.

During runningGIProblem:

During two are tested, the uncomfortable low subregion (table 1) being in most of the cases positioned at scoring reported.

Table 1:

The blanket statistics (by puing question to) disposed

When relatively more different disposal, somewhat higher to 10 scorings putd question in red gel group.In blue gel group, the scorings to 6 enquirements are somewhat higher.The scoring putd question to one is identical.(seeing table 2)

What in discovery score, difference was maximum is backflows (-0.46), intestines cramp (-0.42) and loose stool (-0.38), and it shows that red gel has more problem.

The calculating mean value of the upper abdomen problem of blue gel is relatively low.As for lower abdomen problem being also.Red gel shows less systemic problems.

To mean value application Wilcoxon signed rank sum test (initial data sees annex) of each in each participant three partial symptoms.Wherein all do not demonstrate statistical significance.

Table 2:

Dispose the blanket statistics (by puing question to) of difference (the red glue of blue gel contrast)

Observe individuality, use two people of red gel to show high mean value (＞ 4) at lower digestive tract problematic portion.Observe that lower digestive tract problem in two tests for the participant all shows high mean value (＞ 3).

11 runners using red gel show serious symptom (＞ 5), use 6 runners of blue gel to show serious symptom, and 3 runners have serious problem in two tests.

Wilcoxon signed rank sum test shows for upper abdomen problem (effect assessment,-0.1, se=0.14, p=0.76), for lower abdomen problem (effect assessment ,-0.19, se=0.14, p=0.22) with for whole body problem (effect assessment, 0.14, se=0.08, p=0.15) do not have conspicuousness to dispose difference (GLU-GLU/FRC).The average run time between each disposal, (GLU tested: 1: 14: 25 ± 7: 17 (hours: minute: second)；GLU/FRC tests: 1: 14: 41 ± 7: 10 (hours: minute: second)) there is no difference.

Though the CHO of a large amount picked-up gel form, the average of GI problem is at the low subregion of scoring, and it is shown in has relatively good tolerance to the CHO of high intake during 16km races, and does not has difference between GLU and GLU/FRC.

Embodiment 4:

inventionTitles.title: 生产莱鲍迪苷D加甜的低热碳酸软饮料的方法
Produce the method for the low-heat carbonated soft drink that Rebaudiodside A D sweetens

address.address1: USA New York
USA New York
USA New York
China Council for the promotion of international trade patent and Trademark Office
