section.content: A kind of method producing low-heat carbonated soft drink, it includes Rebaudiodside A D (Reb D) mixing of water and edulcoration amount to produce the water that Reb D sweetens；Inject carbon dioxide in the water that Reb D sweetens to produce the water that carbonating Reb D sweetens；The water that carbonating Reb D sweetens is mixed with the syrup not sweetened to form low-heat carbonated soft drink.Or, the method includes Rebaudiodside A D (Reb D) mixing of water and edulcoration amount to produce the water that Reb D sweetens；The water that Reb D sweetens is mixed with syrup；Inject carbon dioxide into mixing Reb D sweeten water and syrup in produce low-heat carbonated soft drink.

种生产低热碳酸软饮料的方法，其包括将水和加甜量的莱鲍迪苷D(Reb D)混合以产生Reb D加甜的水；将二氧化碳注入Reb D加甜的水中以产生碳酸化Reb D加甜的水；将碳酸化Reb D加甜的水与未加甜的糖浆混合以形成低热碳酸软饮料。或者，该方法包括将水和加甜量的莱鲍迪苷D(Reb D)混合以产生Reb D加甜的水；将Reb D加甜的水与糖浆混合；将二氧化碳注入混合的Reb D加甜的水和糖浆中以产生低热碳酸软饮料。

Produce the method for the low-heat carbonated soft drink that Rebaudiodside A D sweetensCross reference to related applications

This application claims that on April 16th, 2012 submits to and invention entitled " production Lai Baodi The U.S. Serial No.61/624 of the method for the carbonated soft drink that glycosides D sweetens ", the priority of 439, In quoting and being fully incorporated herein.

Invention field

The present invention relates to the method for the low-heat carbonated soft drink that production Rebaudiodside A D sweetens.

Background

Sweet steviol glycoside compound exists with little concentration and can be particularly sweet from vegetable material The leaf of Ye Ju (Stevia rebaudiana Bertoni) extracts.In stevia rebaudianum crude extract, It is generally found these compounds and include stevioside, steviolbioside, several Rebaudiodside A, including Lay Bao Di glycosides A, RB, dulcoside B, Rebaudiodside A D and Rebaudiodside A E, and Du Gram glycoside compound.For convenience, Rebaudiodside A can be referred to as herein Reb A, Reb B, Reb C etc..

In Rebaudiodside A, Reb A is often used as the sweetener in beverage application, but has different Taste problem.Reb D has ratio Reb A preferably sugar proterties and a more preferably taste, but Reb D It is difficult to use in beverage products, because its water solubility at room temperature is low.For example, in order to realize CL, Reb D needs to be heated to close to boiled water temperature 2 hours.For example, with reference to U.S. Publication 20110189360.At room temperature, water at most can dissolve about 500ppm.

Reb D has the sugariness (about than sugar sweet 200 times) similar to Reb A.Therefore, have About 500ppm is water-soluble, the sugariness that Reb D can be to beverage lifting for being suitable for.But, this dissolving Degree prepares carbonated soft drink existing problems for use Reb D as primary sweetener.

Conventional method for preparing carbonated soft drink (CSD) needs 6 in concentrate or syrup Times constituent concentration.Then dilute this syrup by 5 times of water, and inject CO2, to form CSD (cola, lemonade (lemon-lime) etc.).If all Syrup ingredients can be dissolved in water In to the degree of 6 times of levels in finished beverage, this will be fruitful.In other words, if Reb D is the primary sweetener of CSD, if then preparing finished beverage with the Reb D of 500ppm, Its water solubility needs for 3000ppm.U.S. Publication 20110189360 teaches and is heated to close to boiling Rise, but this is unpractiaca, because beverage bottle can not carry out such high-temperature heating.Additionally, When cooling, Reb D may precipitate in several hours from super-saturated solution.

Therefore, (e.g., the purpose in terms of some of the present invention is to provide preparation low solubility sweetener Reb D) method of low-heat CSD that sweetens.Disclosure in view of some exemplary following With the benefit discussing, other mesh of whole or some embodiment of system and method disclosed herein And advantage will be that those skilled in the art are obvious.

General introduction

The present invention relates to the low-heat carbonated soft drink that preparation Reb D sweetens as primary sweetener (CSD) method.The present invention utilizes the water that the syrup not sweetened and Reb D sweeten.

Brief description

Fig. 1 is the flow chart of the aspect depicting the inventive method.

Fig. 2 be depict the inventive method another in terms of flow chart.

Describe in detail

In view of the benefit of present disclosure, the various embodiment of present subject matter disclosed herein and Embodiment is all possible, and will be that those of ordinary skill in the art are obvious.At this In disclosure, with regard to " some embodiments ", " some embodiment ", " some example Property embodiment " with similar phrase, each represent that those embodiments are the non-of present subject matter Limitative examples, and there is the alternative embodiment do not got rid of.Unless indicated otherwise or unless separately It is apparent from from the content describing outward, in any one otherwise disclosed embodiment and embodiment The key element of alternatives and options or feature can be exchanged each other.It should be understood that an embodiment Or in the embodiment that can describe with another of the key element described in embodiment or embodiment Individual or multiple corresponding but different key elements are exchanged or are replaced, and equally, an embodiment or The optional feature of embodiment can also be optionally in other embodiments and embodiment.More typically Ground, it should be understood that the key element of any disclosed embodiment or embodiment and feature generally disclose can To be used together with other features and other embodiments and embodiment.With regard to operability or join It is set to perform component or composition, the purport of one or more functions specified, task and/or operation etc. Representing that it can perform such function, task and/or operation at least some of embodiment, And also can may perform one or more other functions, task and/or operation well.

According to certain aspects of the invention, Reb D is used as the primary sweetener in low-heat CSD. Low-heat CSD is defined as the beverage of 40 or more low-calorie/part (8 ounces).If it is every The calorie of part is less than 5 calories, then CSD can be defined as zero calorie beverage.

Substantial amounts of soda is frequently not prepared on a large scale.But feedwater injecting carbon dioxide. Then the syrup of carbonated water and edulcoration is injected simultaneously into container, as in bottle or tank to form CSD.Will This container fast sealing.Or, by the syrup sweetening and water mixing, then note when beverage bottling Enter carbon dioxide to form CSD.By this container fast sealing.

Generally, by portion syrup and five parts of water mixing.This syrup is concentrate, and described composition This concentrate must be solvable.For example, the typical sweet agent in low-heat soda is Aspartame.This Aspartame must be dissolvable in water in syrup and reach 3000ppm, in order to when dilute with water The required sweetness value of 500ppm is provided when releasing.Other sweeteners, including Reb A, can be used for In syrup.These sweeteners have acceptable water solubility.

Due to its poor solubility in syrup, the natural sweetener of Reb D and other poor solubility Cannot act as the primary sweetener in CSD.That is, people can not obtain required Reb D in syrup Concentration 6 times of consumption (in finished beverage) is to obtain the low-heat that wherein Reb D is required sweetener Beverage.The present invention is by being dissolved in Reb D in water source, rather than is dissolved in syrup and solves This problem.

Therefore, in an aspect, as shown in fig. 1, by Reb D (10) and water (12) Mixing, produces the water (14) that Reb D sweetens.The water that Reb D sweetens can be saved in water storage Deposit in tank.The water injecting carbon dioxide (16) sweetening to Reb D, produces carbonating Reb D and adds Sweet water (18).Then, by carbonating Reb the D water (18) sweetening and the syrup not sweetened (20) it is injected simultaneously in container (22), form low-heat CSD.

Or, as shown in Figure 2, Reb D (10) is mixed with water (12), produces Reb D The water (14) sweetening.The water (14) sweetening Reb D and the syrup (202) not sweetened mix Close, form the syrup water (24) sweetening, be then injected into carbon dioxide (16), form low-heat CSD (26) it, is then injected in container (22).

The water (14) that Reb D sweetens can be preserved in water store tank a period of time, but add Syrup and carbonating and the remaining step being placed in container are continuous print processes.Described container Can be any suitable container, such as glass or plastic bottle or metal can.

The present invention does not needs 6 times of Reb D concentration and works, because not being to join Reb D It in syrup, but is dissolved in Reb D in the water section of process.500ppm Reb D's Room temperature solubility then be enough to provide required sugariness in the low-heat CSD that obtained Reb D sweetens.

Reb D can be obtained from Stevia plant in any suitable manner.For example, from Stevia plant Extract stevia rebaudianum composition.The composition making extraction accepts classification and separates (column chromatography), to isolate component, Such as Reb D, Reb A, stevioside etc..For example, separate and purify Reb D by recrystallization.

Water is normally taken from pure water holding vessel.The present invention is with the Reb of edulcoration amount in this holding vessel Water is sweetened by D.Do not need heating, other unnecessary compositions or with high investment.

Will be up to 500ppm, for example, 400 to 500ppm, 425 to 475ppm, or 450ppm The Reb D of amount be added to the water.The temperature of water generally remains at room temperature.

Owing to Reb D can provide good sweet taste under low consumption, and there is no artificial sweetener Or the bitter taste of natural non-nutritive sweetener (e.g., Reb A) or metallic aftertaste, therefore preferably make With Reb D as primary sweetener.Have also contemplated that the sweetener of other poor solubility.

Syrup disclosed herein can contain various compositions, and this depends on required CSD characteristic and taste Road.For example, suitable composition include, but not limited to flavorant, caffeine, caramel and its His colouring agent or dyestuff, acid, preservative, defoamer, natural gum, emulsifying agent, tea solid, cloud up Compound, and mineral matter and non-mineral nutritional replenishers.

Suitably flavorant is it may be that for example, the natural fruit essence with synthesis, plant essence, As can happy tea, pungent and fragrant flavorings, as fragrant in cassia bark, cloves, Chinese cassia tree, pepper, ginger, vanilla Pungent flavoring, cardamom, coriander, root beer, sassafras, ginseng etc..

Suitable acid it may be that for example, phosphoric acid, citric acid, malic acid, tartaric acid, lactic acid, Fumaric acid, ascorbic acid, gluconic acid, butanedioic acid, maleic acid, adipic acid, cinnamic acid, penta 2 Acid, and any mixture.

E (tocopherol), C (ascorbic acid), B (thiamine), B2 (riboflavin), B6, B12 and K, nicotinic acid, leaf Acid, biotin, and combinations thereof.Optional non-mineral nutritional replenishers are generally with according to high-quality life Produce the general acceptable amount of specification to exist.Exemplary amount is about 1% to about 100%RDV, wherein this The RDV of sample determines that.In some exemplary, non-mineral nutritional replenishers become Dividing the amount generally with about 5% to about 20%RDV to exist, wherein RDV determines that.
